title: Authors and Citation
text: Xu Meng. Author, maintainer. Hao Zhang. Author.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Meng X, Zhang H (2026). scop: Single Cell Omics analysis Pipeline. R package version 0.8.7, https://mengxu98.github.io/scop/.
code: @Manual{,   title = {scop: Single Cell Omics analysis Pipeline},   author = {Xu Meng and Hao Zhang},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.8.7},   url = {https://mengxu98.github.io/scop/}, }

title: Single Cell Omics analysis Pipeline
text: scop package provides unified extensible framework single-cell omics data processing downstream analysis Seurat: Integrated single-cell quality control methods, including doublet detection methods (scDblFinder, scds, Scrublet, DoubletDetection) ambient RNA decontamination via decontX. Pipelines embedded multiple methods normalization, feature reduction (PCA, ICA, NMF, MDS, GLMPCA, UMAP, TriMap, LargeVis, PaCMAP, PHATE, DM, FR), cell population identification. Pipelines embedded multiple integration methods scRNA-seq, including Uncorrected, Seurat, scVI, MNN, fastMNN, Harmony, Scanorama, BBKNN, CSS, Coralysis, LIGER, Conos, ComBat. Multiple methods automatic annotation single-cell data (CellTypist, SingleR, Scmap, KNNPredict) methods projection single-cell datasets (CSSMap, PCAMap, SeuratMap, SymphonyMap). Differential expression analysis: identification differential features, expressed marker identification. Enrichment analysis: -representation analysis, GSEA analysis, dynamic enrichment analysis. Cellular potency: CytoTRACE 2 predicting cellular differentiation potential. RNA velocity: RNA velocity, PAGA, Palantir, CellRank, WOT. Trajectory inference: Slingshot, Monocle2, Monocle3, identification dynamic features. Cell-Cell Communication: CellChat, CellphoneDB, NicheNet, MultiNicheNet. High-quality data visualization methods. Fast deployment single-cell data SCExplorer, shiny app provides interactive visualization interface.

title: Single Cell Omics analysis Pipeline
text: Introduction Table Contents Credits R requirement Python environment Data exploration Quality control Integration pipeline Cell projection single-cell datasets Cell annotation using bulk RNA-seq datasets Cell annotation using single-cell datasets CytoTRACE 2 RNA Velocity analysis PAGA Slingshot Monocle3 Dynamic features Differential expression analysis -representation GSEA Interactive data visualization SCExplorer visualization examples

title: Single Cell Omics analysis Pipeline
text: scop package developed based SCP package, following major improvements: Compatibility: full support Seurat v5. Stability: large number known issues fixed, functions passed devtools::check(). Usability: Python environment setup workflow improved, allowing new complete environment deployed within minutes; standardized console messages via thisutils::log_message consistent, readable function outputs. Performance: new parallel framework developed based thisutils::parallelize_fun, providing consistent experience across Linux, macOS, Windows. Functionality: analysis methods added, including CellRank, CellTypist, CytoTRACE 2, CellChat, GSVA, scMetabolism scProportionTest.

title: Single Cell Omics analysis Pipeline
text: R >= 4.1.0 can install latest version scop pak GitHub :
code: if (!require("pak", quietly = TRUE)) {   install.packages("pak") } pak::pak("mengxu98/scop")

title: Single Cell Omics analysis Pipeline
text: run functions RunPAGA(), RunSCVELO(), scop requires conda create separate environment. default environment name "scop_env". can specify environment name scop setting options(scop_envname = "new_name"). Now, can run PrepareEnv() create python environment scop. conda binary found, automatically download install miniconda. force scop use specific conda binary, recommended set reticulate.conda_binary R option: download miniconda pip packages slow, can specify miniconda repo PyPI mirror according network region. https://repo.anaconda.com/miniconda (default) http://mirrors.aliyun.com/anaconda/miniconda https://mirrors.bfsu.edu.cn/anaconda/miniconda https://mirrors.pku.edu.cn/anaconda/miniconda https://mirror.nju.edu.cn/anaconda/miniconda https://mirrors.sustech.edu.cn/anaconda/miniconda https://mirrors.xjtu.edu.cn/anaconda/miniconda https://mirrors.hit.edu.cn/anaconda/miniconda https://pypi.python.org/simple (default) https://mirrors.aliyun.com/pypi/simple https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple https://mirrors.pku.edu.cn/pypi/simple https://mirror.nju.edu.cn/pypi/web/simple https://mirrors.sustech.edu.cn/pypi/simple https://mirrors.xjtu.edu.cn/pypi/simple https://mirrors.hit.edu.cn/pypi/web/simple
code: scop::PrepareEnv() options(reticulate.conda_binary = "/path/to/conda") scop::PrepareEnv() scop::PrepareEnv(   miniconda_repo = "https://mirrors.bfsu.edu.cn/anaconda/miniconda",   pip_options = "-i https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple" )

title: Single Cell Omics analysis Pipeline
text: analysis based subsetted version mouse pancreas data.
code: library(scop) data(pancreas_sub) print(pancreas_sub) #> An object of class Seurat  #> 47994 features across 1000 samples within 3 assays  #> Active assay: RNA (15998 features, 0 variable features) #>  1 layer present: counts #>  2 other assays present: spliced, unspliced pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub) print(pancreas_sub) #>  An object of class Seurat  #>  47994 features across 1000 samples within 3 assays  #>  Active assay: RNA (15998 features, 2000 variable features) #>   3 layers present: counts, data, scale.data #>   2 other assays present: spliced, unspliced #>   5 dimensional reductions calculated: Standardpca, StandardpcaUMAP2D, StandardpcaUMAP3D, StandardUMAP2D, StandardUMAP3D CellDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = c("CellType", "SubCellType"),   reduction = "UMAP",   xlab = "UMAP_1",   ylab = "UMAP_2" ) CellDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "SubCellType",   stat.by = "Phase",   reduction = "UMAP",   theme_use = "theme_blank",   xlab = "UMAP_1",   ylab = "UMAP_2" ) FeatureDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   features = c("Sox9", "Neurog3", "Fev", "Rbp4"),   reduction = "UMAP",   theme_use = "theme_blank",   xlab = "UMAP_1",   ylab = "UMAP_2" ) FeatureDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   features = c("Ins1", "Gcg", "Sst", "Ghrl"),   compare_features = TRUE,   label = TRUE,   label_insitu = TRUE,   reduction = "UMAP",   theme_use = "theme_blank",   xlab = "UMAP_1",   ylab = "UMAP_2" ) ht <- GroupHeatmap(   pancreas_sub,   features = c(     "Sox9", "Anxa2", # Ductal     "Neurog3", "Hes6", # EPs     "Fev", "Neurod1", # Pre-endocrine     "Rbp4", "Pyy", # Endocrine     "Ins1", "Gcg", "Sst", "Ghrl" # Beta, Alpha, Delta, Epsilon   ),   group.by = c("CellType", "SubCellType"),   heatmap_palette = "Spectral",   cell_annotation = c("Phase", "G2M_score", "Cdh2"),   cell_annotation_palette = c("Dark2", "Chinese", "Chinese"),   show_row_names = TRUE,   nlabel = 0,   row_names_side = "left",   add_dot = TRUE,   add_reticle = TRUE,   width = 2.2,   height = 2.5 ) print(ht$plot)

title: Single Cell Omics analysis Pipeline
code: pancreas_sub <- RunCellQC(pancreas_sub) CellDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "CellQC",   reduction = "UMAP" ) CellStatPlot(   pancreas_sub,   stat.by = "CellQC",   group.by = "CellType" ) + ggplot2::theme(aspect.ratio = 1 / 2) CellStatPlot(   pancreas_sub,   stat.by = c(     "db_qc", "decontX_qc", "outlier_qc",     "umi_qc", "gene_qc",     "mito_qc", "ribo_qc",     "ribo_mito_ratio_qc", "species_qc"   ),   plot_type = "upset",   stat_level = "Fail" ) + ggplot2::theme(aspect.ratio = 1 / 2)

title: Single Cell Omics analysis Pipeline
text: Example data integration subsetted version panc8(eight human pancreas datasets)
code: data(panc8_sub) panc8_sub <- integration_scop(   srt_merge = panc8_sub,   batch = "tech",   integration_method = "Harmony" ) CellDimPlot(   panc8_sub,   group.by = c("tech", "celltype"),   reduction = "HarmonyUMAP",   theme_use = "theme_blank" )

title: Single Cell Omics analysis Pipeline
code: genenames <- make.unique(   thisutils::capitalize(     rownames(panc8_sub[["RNA"]]),     force_tolower = TRUE   ) ) names(genenames) <- rownames(panc8_sub) panc8_rename <- RenameFeatures(   panc8_sub,   newnames = genenames,   assays = "RNA" ) srt_query <- RunKNNMap(   srt_query = pancreas_sub,   srt_ref = panc8_rename,   ref_umap = "HarmonyUMAP2D" ) ProjectionPlot(   srt_query = srt_query,   srt_ref = panc8_rename,   query_group = "SubCellType",   ref_group = "celltype",   ref_param = list(     xlab = "UMAP_1",     ylab = "UMAP_2"   ) )

what: Cell annotation using bulk RNA-seq datasets
title: Single Cell Omics analysis Pipeline
code: data(ref_scMCA) pancreas_sub <- RunKNNPredict(   srt_query = pancreas_sub,   bulk_ref = ref_scMCA,   filter_lowfreq = 20 ) CellDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "KNNPredict_classification",   reduction = "UMAP",   label = TRUE,   xlab = "UMAP_1",   ylab = "UMAP_2" )

title: Single Cell Omics analysis Pipeline
code: pancreas_sub <- RunKNNPredict(   srt_query = pancreas_sub,   srt_ref = panc8_rename,   ref_group = "celltype",   filter_lowfreq = 20 ) CellDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "KNNPredict_classification",   reduction = "UMAP",   label = TRUE,   xlab = "UMAP_1",   ylab = "UMAP_2" ) ht <- CellCorHeatmap(   srt_query = pancreas_sub,   srt_ref = panc8_rename,   query_group = "SubCellType",   ref_group = "celltype",   nlabel = 3,   label_by = "row",   show_row_names = TRUE,   show_column_names = TRUE,   width = 4,   height = 2.5 ) print(ht$plot)

title: Single Cell Omics analysis Pipeline
code: pancreas_sub <- RunCytoTRACE(   pancreas_sub,   species = "Mus_musculus" ) CytoTRACEPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "CellType",   xlab = "UMAP_1",   ylab = "UMAP_2" )

title: Single Cell Omics analysis Pipeline
text: estimate RNA velocity, “spliced” “unspliced” assays required Seurat object. can generate matrices using velocyto, bustools, alevin.
code: pancreas_sub <- RunSCVELO(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "SubCellType",   linear_reduction = "PCA",   nonlinear_reduction = "UMAP" ) VelocityPlot(   pancreas_sub,   reduction = "UMAP",   group.by = "SubCellType",   xlab = "UMAP_1",   ylab = "UMAP_2" ) VelocityPlot(   pancreas_sub,   reduction = "UMAP",   plot_type = "stream",   xlab = "UMAP_1",   ylab = "UMAP_2" )

title: Single Cell Omics analysis Pipeline
code: pancreas_sub <- RunPAGA(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "SubCellType",   linear_reduction = "PCA",   nonlinear_reduction = "UMAP" ) PAGAPlot(   pancreas_sub,   reduction = "UMAP",   label = TRUE,   label_insitu = TRUE,   label_repel = TRUE,   edge_size = c(0.5, 1),   edge_color = "black",   xlab = "UMAP_1",   ylab = "UMAP_2" )

title: Single Cell Omics analysis Pipeline
code: pancreas_sub <- RunSlingshot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "SubCellType",   reduction = "UMAP",   start = "Ductal",   end = c("Alpha", "Beta") ) CellDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "SubCellType",   lineages = paste0("Lineage", 1:2),   reduction = "UMAP",   xlab = "UMAP_1",   ylab = "UMAP_2" ) FeatureDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   features = paste0("Lineage", 1:2),   reduction = "UMAP",   theme_use = "theme_blank",   xlab = "UMAP_1",   ylab = "UMAP_2" )

title: Single Cell Omics analysis Pipeline
code: pancreas_sub <- RunMonocle3(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "SubCellType" ) trajectory <- pancreas_sub@tools$Monocle3$trajectory milestones <- pancreas_sub@tools$Monocle3$milestones CellDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "Monocle3_partitions",   reduction = "UMAP",   label = TRUE,   xlab = "UMAP_1",   ylab = "UMAP_2" ) +   trajectory +   milestones +   CellDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     group.by = "Monocle3_clusters",     reduction = "UMAP",     label = TRUE,     xlab = "UMAP_1",     ylab = "UMAP_2"   ) +   trajectory +   CellDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     group.by = "SubCellType",     reduction = "UMAP",     label = TRUE,     xlab = "UMAP_1",     ylab = "UMAP_2"   ) +   trajectory +   FeatureDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     features = "Monocle3_Pseudotime",     reduction = "UMAP",     xlab = "UMAP_1",     ylab = "UMAP_2"   ) +   trajectory

title: Single Cell Omics analysis Pipeline
code: pancreas_sub <- RunDynamicFeatures(   pancreas_sub,   lineages = c("Lineage1", "Lineage2"),   n_candidates = 200 ) # Annotate features with transcription factors and surface proteins pancreas_sub <- AnnotateFeatures(   pancreas_sub,   species = "Mus_musculus",   db = c("TF", "CSPA") ) ht <- DynamicHeatmap(   pancreas_sub,   lineages = c("Lineage1", "Lineage2"),   use_fitted = TRUE,   n_split = 6,   reverse_ht = "Lineage1",   species = "Mus_musculus",   db = "GO_BP",   anno_terms = TRUE,   anno_keys = TRUE,   anno_features = TRUE,   exp_legend_title = "Z-score",   heatmap_palette = "viridis",   cell_annotation = "SubCellType",   separate_annotation = list(     "SubCellType", c("Nnat", "Irx1")   ),   separate_annotation_palette = c("Chinese", "Set1"),   feature_annotation = c("TF", "CSPA"),   feature_annotation_palcolor = list(     c("gold", "steelblue"), c("forestgreen")   ),   pseudotime_label = 25,   pseudotime_label_color = "red",   cores = 6,   height = 5,   width = 2 ) print(ht$plot) DynamicPlot(   pancreas_sub,   lineages = c("Lineage1", "Lineage2"),   group.by = "SubCellType",   features = c(     "Plk1", "Hes1", "Neurod2",     "Ghrl", "Gcg", "Ins2"   ) ) FeatureStatPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "SubCellType",   bg.by = "CellType",   stat.by = c("Sox9", "Neurod2", "Isl1", "Rbp4"),   add_box = TRUE,   comparisons = list(     c("Ductal", "Ngn3 low EP"),     c("Ngn3 high EP", "Pre-endocrine"),     c("Alpha", "Beta")   ) ) + patchwork::plot_layout(   guides = "collect" )

title: Single Cell Omics analysis Pipeline
code: pancreas_sub <- RunDEtest(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "CellType",   fc.threshold = 1,   only.pos = FALSE ) DEtestPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "CellType",   plot_type = "volcano",   label.size = 2 ) DEtestPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "CellType",   plot_type = "manhattan",   label.size = 2 ) + ggplot2::theme(aspect.ratio = 1 / 2) DEtestPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "CellType",   plot_type = "ring",   label.size = 2 ) DEGs <- pancreas_sub@tools$DEtest_CellType$AllMarkers_wilcox DEGs <- DEGs[with(DEGs, avg_log2FC > 1 & p_val_adj < 0.05), ]  ht <- FeatureHeatmap(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "CellType",   features = DEGs$gene,   feature_split = DEGs$group1,   exp_legend_title = "Z-score",   species = "Mus_musculus",   db = c("GO_BP", "KEGG", "WikiPathway"),   anno_terms = TRUE,   feature_annotation = c("TF", "CSPA"),   feature_annotation_palcolor = list(     c("gold", "steelblue"), c("forestgreen")   ),   cores = 6,   height = 5,   width = 3 ) print(ht$plot)

title: Annotate Features — AnnotateFeatures
code: AnnotateFeatures(   srt,   species = "Homo_sapiens",   IDtype = c("symbol", "ensembl_id", "entrez_id"),   db = NULL,   db_update = FALSE,   db_version = "latest",   convert_species = TRUE,   Ensembl_version = NULL,   mirror = NULL,   gtf = NULL,   merge_gtf_by = "gene_name",   columns = c("seqname", "feature", "start", "end", "strand", "gene_id", "gene_name",     "gene_type"),   assays = "RNA",   overwrite = FALSE )

title: Annotate Features — AnnotateFeatures
text: srt Seurat object annotated. species character vector specifying species gene annotation databases prepared. Can "Homo_sapiens" "Mus_musculus". IDtype Type identifier use annotation. Options "symbol", "ensembl_id", "entrez_id". Default "symbol". db character vector specifying annotation sources included gene annotation databases. Can one "GO", "GO_BP", "GO_CC", "GO_MF", "KEGG", "WikiPathway", "Reactome", "CORUM", "MP", "", "HPO", "PFAM", "CSPA", "Surfaceome", "SPRomeDB", "VerSeDa", "TFLink", "hTFtarget", "TRRUST", "JASPAR", "ENCODE", "MSigDB", "CellTalk", "CellChat", "Chromosome", "GeneType", "Enzyme", "TF". db_update Whether gene annotation databases forcefully updated. set FALSE, function attempt load cached databases instead. Default FALSE. db_version character vector specifying version gene annotation databases retrieved. Default "latest". convert_species Whether use species-converted database annotation missing specified species. Default TRUE. Ensembl_version integer specifying Ensembl version. Default NULL. NULL, latest version used. mirror URL mirror use Ensembl database. Default NULL. gtf Path GTF file used annotation. Default NULL. merge_gtf_by Column name merge GTF file . Default "gene_name". columns Vector column names used GTF file. Default "seqname", "feature", "start", "end", "strand", "gene_id", "gene_name", "gene_type". assays Character vector assay names annotated. Default "RNA". overwrite Whether overwrite existing metadata. Default FALSE.

title: The BBKNN integration function — BBKNN_integrate
code: BBKNN_integrate(   srt_merge = NULL,   batch = NULL,   append = TRUE,   srt_list = NULL,   assay = NULL,   do_normalization = NULL,   normalization_method = "LogNormalize",   do_HVF_finding = TRUE,   HVF_source = "separate",   HVF_method = "vst",   nHVF = 2000,   HVF_min_intersection = 1,   HVF = NULL,   do_scaling = TRUE,   vars_to_regress = NULL,   regression_model = "linear",   scale_within_batch = FALSE,   linear_reduction = "pca",   linear_reduction_dims = 50,   linear_reduction_dims_use = NULL,   linear_reduction_params = list(),   force_linear_reduction = FALSE,   nonlinear_reduction = "umap",   nonlinear_reduction_dims = c(2, 3),   nonlinear_reduction_params = list(),   force_nonlinear_reduction = TRUE,   cluster_algorithm = "louvain",   cluster_resolution = 0.6,   bbknn_params = list(),   verbose = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: The BBKNN integration function — BBKNN_integrate
text: srt_merge merged `Seurat` object includes batch information. batch character string specifying batch variable name. append Whether integrated data appended original Seurat object (srt_merge). Default TRUE. srt_list list Seurat objects checked preprocessed. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. do_normalization Whether data normalization performed. Default TRUE. normalization_method normalization method used. Possible values "LogNormalize", "SCT", "TFIDF". Default "LogNormalize". do_HVF_finding Whether perform high variable feature finding. TRUE, function force find highly variable features (HVF) using specified HVF method. HVF_source source highly variable features. Possible values "global" "separate". Default "separate". HVF_method method use finding highly variable features. Options "vst", "mvp", "disp". Default "vst". nHVF number highly variable features select. NULL, highly variable features used. Default 2000. HVF_min_intersection feature needs present batches minimum number times order considered highly variable. Default 1. HVF vector feature names use highly variable features. NULL, function use highly variable features identified HVF method. do_scaling Whether perform scaling. TRUE, function force scale data using Seurat::ScaleData function. vars_to_regress vector variable names include additional regression variables. Default NULL. regression_model regression model use scaling. Options "linear", "poisson", "negativebinomial". Default "linear". scale_within_batch Whether scale data within batch. valid integration_method one "Uncorrected", "Seurat", "MNN", "Harmony", "BBKNN", "CSS", "ComBat". linear_reduction linear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "pca", "svd", "ica", "nmf", "mds", "glmpca". Default "pca". linear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep linear dimensionality reduction. Default 50. linear_reduction_dims_use dimensions use downstream analysis. NULL, estimated dimensions stored linear reduction used available; otherwise, first 50 dimensions used fallback. linear_reduction_params list parameters pass linear dimensionality reduction method. force_linear_reduction Whether force linear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". nonlinear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep nonlinear dimensionality reduction. vector provided, different numbers dimensions can specified method. Default c(2, 3). nonlinear_reduction_params list parameters pass nonlinear dimensionality reduction method. force_nonlinear_reduction Whether force nonlinear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. Default TRUE. cluster_algorithm clustering algorithm use. Options "louvain", "slm", "leiden". Default "louvain". cluster_resolution resolution parameter use clustering. Larger values result fewer clusters. Default 0.6. bbknn_params list parameters bbknn.matrix.bbknn function, default empty list. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

text: srt_merge merged `Seurat` object includes batch information. batch character string specifying batch variable name. append Whether integrated data appended original Seurat object (srt_merge). Default TRUE. srt_list list Seurat objects checked preprocessed. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. do_normalization Whether data normalization performed. Default TRUE. normalization_method normalization method used. Possible values "LogNormalize", "SCT", "TFIDF". Default "LogNormalize". do_HVF_finding Whether perform high variable feature finding. TRUE, function force find highly variable features (HVF) using specified HVF method. HVF_source source highly variable features. Possible values "global" "separate". Default "separate". HVF_method method use finding highly variable features. Options "vst", "mvp", "disp". Default "vst". nHVF number highly variable features select. NULL, highly variable features used. Default 2000. HVF_min_intersection feature needs present batches minimum number times order considered highly variable. Default 1. HVF vector feature names use highly variable features. NULL, function use highly variable features identified HVF method. do_scaling Whether perform scaling. TRUE, function force scale data using Seurat::ScaleData function. vars_to_regress vector variable names include additional regression variables. Default NULL. regression_model regression model use scaling. Options "linear", "poisson", "negativebinomial". Default "linear". linear_reduction linear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "pca", "svd", "ica", "nmf", "mds", "glmpca". Default "pca". linear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep linear dimensionality reduction. Default 50. linear_reduction_dims_use dimensions use downstream analysis. NULL, estimated dimensions stored linear reduction used available; otherwise, first 50 dimensions used fallback. linear_reduction_params list parameters pass linear dimensionality reduction method. force_linear_reduction Whether force linear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". nonlinear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep nonlinear dimensionality reduction. vector provided, different numbers dimensions can specified method. Default c(2, 3). nonlinear_reduction_params list parameters pass nonlinear dimensionality reduction method. force_nonlinear_reduction Whether force nonlinear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. Default TRUE. neighbor_metric distance metric use finding neighbors. Options "euclidean", "cosine", "manhattan", "hamming". code: CCCHeatmap(   srt,   method = NULL,   condition = NULL,   dataset = 1,   comparison = c(1, 2),   plot_type = c("heatmap", "dot", "bubble", "ligand_target", "role_heatmap",     "diff_heatmap"),   display_by = c("aggregation", "interaction"),   sender.use = NULL,   receiver.use = NULL,   ligand.use = NULL,   receptor.use = NULL,   interaction.use = NULL,   signaling = NULL,   pairLR.use = NULL,   slot.name = "net",   thresh = 0.05,   measure = c("count", "weight"),   pattern = c("outgoing", "incoming", "all"),   value = "sum",   top_n = 500,   top_anno = "bar",   right_anno = "cell",   left_anno = "bar",   bottom_anno = "cell",   bar_value = "sum",   add_text = NULL,   cluster_rows = FALSE,   cluster_columns = FALSE,   color.by = c("score", "pvalue"),   x_text_angle = 90,   facet_by = NULL,   show_row_names = TRUE,   show_column_names = TRUE,   edge_value = c("sum", "mean", "max", "count"),   border = TRUE,   value_palette = "RdBu",   value_palcolor = NULL,   cell_palette = "Chinese",   cell_palcolor = NULL,   palette = "Chinese",   palcolor = NULL,   width = NULL,   height = NULL,   units = "inch",   title = NULL,   subtitle = NULL,   legend.position = "right",   legend.direction = "vertical",   font.size = 10,   theme_use = "theme_scop",   theme_args = list(),   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: CCC heatmap and dot matrix plot — CCCHeatmap
text: srt Seurat object. method Communication result type use. condition Result name comparison name. dataset Dataset index name. comparison Comparison indices names. plot_type Plot type. One "heatmap" "dot". "bubble" CellChat-specific interaction bubble matrix. "ligand_target" special heatmap path available NicheNet/MultiNicheNet results. "role_heatmap" "diff_heatmap" CellChat-specific pathway role views. display_by Whether summarize "aggregation" "interaction". sender.use Sender cell types keep. receiver.use Receiver cell types keep. ligand.use Ligands keep. receptor.use Receptors keep. interaction.use Interaction names keep. signaling Signaling pathway focus . pairLR.use Specific ligand-receptor pair(s) keep. slot.name CellChat slot name. thresh Significance threshold used extracting communication results. measure Summary measure CellChat objects. pattern Pattern used pathway role plots. value Value column summary statistic use. top_n Number top records retain. top_anno, bottom_anno Column-side annotations sender groups. side accepts NULL, "bar", "box", "point", "line", "histogram", "density", "violin", "cell", character vector containing multiple values. Defaults top_anno = "bar" bottom_anno = "cell". left_anno, right_anno Row-side annotations receiver groups. side accepts NULL, "bar", "box", "point", "line", "histogram", "density", "violin", "cell", character vector containing multiple values. Defaults left_anno = "bar" right_anno = "cell". bar_value Aggregation metric shown bar annotations. One "count", "sum", "mean", "max". Multiple values add multiple annotation tracks. Default "sum". add_text Logical. Show numeric value labels inside cell (heatmap mode ). Default TRUE aggregation mode, FALSE interaction mode. cluster_rows, cluster_columns Whether cluster heatmap rows/columns. Defaults FALSE. color.interaction heatmaps, value used tile coloring. Usually "score" "pvalue". x_text_angle Rotation angle x-axis labels. facet_by Faceting variable interaction-level plots. show_row_names, show_column_names Whether draw row/column names heatmap body. edge_value Aggregation statistic network edges. border Logical. Whether draw borders heatmap body annotation tracks. Default TRUE. value_palette Palette used heatmap value fills. value_palcolor Optional custom colors value_palette. cell_palette Cell annotation palette name. cell_palcolor Custom cell annotation colors. palette Main palette name. palcolor Main custom palette colors. width, height Optional heatmap body width height. one supplied, inferred matrix dimensions keep cells square. NULL, square-cell size computed automatically. units Units width height. Default "inch". title Plot title. subtitle Plot subtitle. legend.position Legend position. legend.direction Legend direction. font.size Base font size. theme_use Theme function used styling. theme_args Arguments passed theme function. verbose Whether print messages. ... Additional plot-specific options.

title: CCC network and flow plots — CCCNetworkPlot
text: srt Seurat object. method Communication result type use. condition Result name comparison name. dataset Dataset index name. comparison Comparison indices names. plot_type Plot type. One "circle", "chord", "pathway", "individual_lr", "arrow", "sigmoid", "bipartite", "embedding_network", "diff_network". display_by Whether summarize "aggregation" "interaction". sender.use Sender cell types keep. receiver.use Receiver cell types keep. ligand.use Ligands keep. receptor.use Receptors keep. interaction.use Interaction names keep. group.plot_type = "embedding_network": metadata column used define cell groups. NULL, grouping stored CCC result used available. reduction plot_type = "embedding_network": dimensional reduction use. NULL, default reduction used. dims plot_type = "embedding_network": dimensions plot. signaling Signaling pathway focus . pairLR.use Specific ligand-receptor pair(s) keep. slot.name CellChat slot name. thresh Significance threshold used extracting communication results. measure Summary measure CellChat objects. value Value column summary statistic use. top_n Number top records retain. ligand plot_type = "bipartite": ligand name focus . NULL, ligand highest total score used. receptor plot_type = "bipartite": optional receptor names restrict . NULL, receptors paired ligand shown. reg.plot_type = "bipartite": optional metadata column srt used color edges regulation status (e.g. /). NULL, edges colored sender cell type. reg_palette plot_type = "bipartite": named character vector palette name regulation categories. reg_palcolor plot_type = "bipartite": custom colors regulation palette. expr.plot_type = "bipartite": optional metadata score column used scale edge line width. NULL, edges equal width. layout Layout used graph-based network views. "chord" can also requested via plot_type = "circle" backward compatibility. link_curvature Curvature used circle-like differential links flow edges. link_alpha Alpha used network edges. edge_value Aggregation statistic network edges. edge_threshold Minimum edge value keep. edge_size Range used scaling edge widths. edge_color Optional edge color override. differential networks, may also length-2 vector negative/positive changes. edge_alpha Alpha used embedding-network edges. edge_line Edge geometry plot_type = "arrow", "sigmoid", "embedding_network". edge_curvature Curvature used curved flow/embedding edges. directed Whether draw arrows directed networks. arrow_type Arrow head type passed grid::arrow(). arrow_angle Arrow head angle passed grid::arrow(). arrow_length Arrow length passed grid::arrow(). node_size Base node size. node_alpha Node alpha. palette Main palette name. palcolor Main custom palette colors. cell_palette Cell annotation palette name. cell_palcolor Custom cell annotation colors. link_palette Link palette name. link_palcolor Custom link palette colors. title Plot title. subtitle Plot subtitle. legend.position Legend position. legend.direction Legend direction. legend.title Legend title. font.size Base font size. theme_use Theme function used styling. theme_args Arguments passed theme function. verbose Whether print messages. ... Additional plot-specific options. chord plots, reduce, max.groups, small.gap, big.gap, lab.cex can used adjust CellChat-like chord layout.

title: CCC statistical distribution and summary plots — CCCStatPlot
text: srt Seurat object. method Communication result type use. condition Result name comparison name. dataset Dataset index name. comparison Comparison indices names. plot_type Plot type. One : "bar" — horizontal bar chart top interactions aggregated score. "sankey" — alluvial/sankey flow diagram. "box" / "violin" — distribution interaction scores across sender-receiver pairs. "comparison" — comparison bars overall celltype level. "lr_contribution" — ligand-receptor contribution bar plot. "gene" —  pathway-related ligand/receptor gene expression panel. "ranknet" — pathway ranking comparison plot. "scatter" — outgoing vs. incoming signaling strength scatter. "role_change" — signaling change scatter one cell identity. display_by Whether summarize "aggregation" "interaction". sender.use Sender cell types keep. receiver.use Receiver cell types keep. ligand.use Ligands keep. receptor.use Receptors keep. interaction.use Interaction names keep. signaling Signaling pathway focus . pairLR.use Specific ligand-receptor pair(s) keep. slot.name CellChat slot name. thresh Significance threshold used extracting communication results. measure Summary measure CellChat objects. pattern Pattern used pathway role plots. compare_by Comparison mode CellChat summary plots. value Value column summary statistic use. stat_type "bar": summarize per interaction. One "score" (total aggregated score) "count" (number significant interactions). top_n Number top records retain. x_text_angle Rotation angle x-axis labels. link_alpha Alpha used network edges. facet_by Faceting variable interaction-level plots. edge_value Aggregation statistic network edges. edge_threshold Minimum edge value keep. palette Main palette name. palcolor Main custom palette colors. cell_palette Cell annotation palette name. cell_palcolor Custom cell annotation colors. link_palette Link palette name. link_palcolor Custom link palette colors. title Plot title. subtitle Plot subtitle. legend.position Legend position. legend.direction Legend direction. font.size Base font size. theme_use Theme function used styling. theme_args Arguments passed theme function. combine Whether combine multiple panels. nrow Number rows combined layout. ncol Number columns combined layout. verbose Whether print messages. ... Additional plot-specific options.

title: The CSS integration function — CSS_integrate
code: CSS_integrate(   srt_merge = NULL,   batch = NULL,   append = TRUE,   srt_list = NULL,   assay = NULL,   do_normalization = NULL,   normalization_method = "LogNormalize",   do_HVF_finding = TRUE,   HVF_source = "separate",   HVF_method = "vst",   nHVF = 2000,   HVF_min_intersection = 1,   HVF = NULL,   do_scaling = TRUE,   vars_to_regress = NULL,   regression_model = "linear",   scale_within_batch = FALSE,   linear_reduction = "pca",   linear_reduction_dims = 50,   linear_reduction_dims_use = NULL,   linear_reduction_params = list(),   force_linear_reduction = FALSE,   CSS_dims_use = NULL,   nonlinear_reduction = "umap",   nonlinear_reduction_dims = c(2, 3),   nonlinear_reduction_params = list(),   force_nonlinear_reduction = TRUE,   neighbor_metric = "euclidean",   neighbor_k = 20L,   cluster_algorithm = "louvain",   cluster_resolution = 0.6,   CSS_params = list(),   verbose = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: The CSS integration function — CSS_integrate
text: srt_merge merged `Seurat` object includes batch information. batch character string specifying batch variable name. append Whether integrated data appended original Seurat object (srt_merge). Default TRUE. srt_list list Seurat objects checked preprocessed. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. do_normalization Whether data normalization performed. Default TRUE. normalization_method normalization method used. Possible values "LogNormalize", "SCT", "TFIDF". Default "LogNormalize". do_HVF_finding Whether perform high variable feature finding. TRUE, function force find highly variable features (HVF) using specified HVF method. HVF_source source highly variable features. Possible values "global" "separate". Default "separate". HVF_method method use finding highly variable features. Options "vst", "mvp", "disp". Default "vst". nHVF number highly variable features select. NULL, highly variable features used. Default 2000. HVF_min_intersection feature needs present batches minimum number times order considered highly variable. Default 1. HVF vector feature names use highly variable features. NULL, function use highly variable features identified HVF method. do_scaling Whether perform scaling. TRUE, function force scale data using Seurat::ScaleData function. vars_to_regress vector variable names include additional regression variables. Default NULL. regression_model regression model use scaling. Options "linear", "poisson", "negativebinomial". Default "linear". scale_within_batch Whether scale data within batch. valid integration_method one "Uncorrected", "Seurat", "MNN", "Harmony", "BBKNN", "CSS", "ComBat". linear_reduction linear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "pca", "svd", "ica", "nmf", "mds", "glmpca". Default "pca". linear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep linear dimensionality reduction. Default 50. linear_reduction_dims_use dimensions use downstream analysis. NULL, estimated dimensions stored linear reduction used available; otherwise, first 50 dimensions used fallback. linear_reduction_params list parameters pass linear dimensionality reduction method. force_linear_reduction Whether force linear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. CSS_dims_use vector specifying dimensions returned CSS utilized downstream cell cluster finding nonlinear reduction. set NULL, returned dimensions used default. nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". nonlinear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep nonlinear dimensionality reduction. vector provided, different numbers dimensions can specified method. Default c(2, 3). nonlinear_reduction_params list parameters pass nonlinear dimensionality reduction method. force_nonlinear_reduction Whether force nonlinear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. Default TRUE. neighbor_metric distance metric use finding neighbors. Options "euclidean", "cosine", "manhattan", "hamming". Default "euclidean". neighbor_k number nearest neighbors use finding neighbors. Default 20. cluster_algorithm clustering algorithm use. Options "louvain", "slm", "leiden". Default "louvain". cluster_resolution resolution parameter use clustering. Larger values result fewer clusters. Default 0.6. CSS_params list parameters [simspec::cluster_sim_spectrum](https://github.com/quadbio/simspec) function. Default `list()`. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: The Cell Correlation Heatmap — CellCorHeatmap
text: function generates heatmap visualize similarity different cell types conditions. takes Seurat objects expression matrices input calculates pairwise similarities distance.

title: The Cell Correlation Heatmap — CellCorHeatmap
code: CellCorHeatmap(   srt_query,   srt_ref = NULL,   bulk_ref = NULL,   query_group = NULL,   ref_group = NULL,   query_assay = NULL,   ref_assay = NULL,   query_reduction = NULL,   ref_reduction = NULL,   query_dims = 1:30,   ref_dims = 1:30,   query_collapsing = !is.null(query_group),   ref_collapsing = TRUE,   features = NULL,   features_type = c("HVF", "DE"),   feature_source = "both",   nfeatures = 2000,   DEtest_param = list(max.cells.per.ident = 200, test.use = "wilcox"),   DE_threshold = "p_val_adj < 0.05",   distance_metric = "cosine",   k = 30,   filter_lowfreq = 0,   prefix = "KNNPredict",   exp_legend_title = NULL,   border = TRUE,   flip = FALSE,   limits = NULL,   cluster_rows = FALSE,   cluster_columns = FALSE,   show_row_names = FALSE,   show_column_names = FALSE,   row_names_side = "left",   column_names_side = "top",   row_names_rot = 0,   column_names_rot = 90,   row_title = NULL,   column_title = NULL,   row_title_side = "left",   column_title_side = "top",   row_title_rot = 90,   column_title_rot = 0,   nlabel = 0,   label_cutoff = 0,   label_by = "row",   label_size = 10,   heatmap_palette = "RdBu",   heatmap_palcolor = NULL,   query_group_palette = "Chinese",   query_group_palcolor = NULL,   ref_group_palette = "simspec",   ref_group_palcolor = NULL,   query_annotation = NULL,   query_annotation_palette = "Chinese",   query_annotation_palcolor = NULL,   query_cell_annotation_params = if (flip) {      list(height = grid::unit(10, "mm"))  }     else {      list(width = grid::unit(10, "mm"))  },   ref_annotation = NULL,   ref_annotation_palette = "Chinese",   ref_annotation_palcolor = NULL,   ref_cell_annotation_params = if (flip) {      list(width = grid::unit(10, "mm"))  }     else {      list(height = grid::unit(10, "mm"))  },   use_raster = NULL,   raster_device = "png",   raster_by_magick = FALSE,   height = NULL,   width = NULL,   units = "inch",   seed = 11,   ht_params = list() )

title: The Cell Correlation Heatmap — CellCorHeatmap
text: srt_query object class Seurat annotated cell types. srt_ref Seurat object count matrix representing reference object. provided, similarities calculated cells query reference objects. provided, similarities calculated within query object. bulk_ref count matrix representing bulk data. provided, similarities calculated cells query object bulk data. query_group grouping variable query object. variable used group cells heatmap rows. provided, cells treated one group. ref_group grouping variable reference object. variable used group cells heatmap columns. provided, cells treated one group. query_assay assay use query object. provided, default assay query object used. ref_assay assay use reference object. provided, default assay reference object used. query_reduction dimensionality reduction method use query object. provided, dimensionality reduction applied query object. ref_reduction dimensionality reduction method use reference object. provided, dimensionality reduction applied reference object. query_dims dimensions use query object. provided, first 30 dimensions used. ref_dims dimensions use reference object. provided, first 30 dimensions used. query_collapsing Whether collapse cells within query group calculating similarities. set TRUE, similarities calculated query groups rather individual cells. ref_collapsing Detail description query_collapsing argument. features vector feature names include heatmap. provided, highly variable features (HVF) used. features_type character vector specifying type features used KNN prediction. Must one "HVF" (highly variable features) "DE" (differentially expressed features). Default "HVF". feature_source source features used. Must one "", "query", "ref". Default "". nfeatures maximum number features include heatmap. Default 2000. DEtest_param parameters use differential expression testing. list two elements: "max.cells.per.ident" specifying maximum number cells per group differential expression testing, "test.use" specifying statistical test use differential expression testing. Default parameters used. DE_threshold threshold differential expression. features adjusted p-values threshold considered differentially expressed. distance_metric distance metric use calculating pairwise distances cells. Options include: "pearson", "spearman", "cosine", "correlation", "jaccard", "ejaccard", "dice", "edice", "hamman", "simple matching", "faith". Additional distance metrics can also used, "euclidean", "manhattan", "hamming", etc. k number nearest neighbors use calculating similarities. Default 30. filter_lowfreq minimum frequency threshold selecting query dataset features. Features frequency threshold excluded heatmap. Default 0. prefix prefix use KNNPredict tool layer query object. can used avoid conflicts tools Seurat object. Default "KNNPredict". exp_legend_title title color legend heatmap. provided, default title based similarity metric used. border Whether add border around heatmap cell. default TRUE. flip Whether flip orientation heatmap. set TRUE, rows columns heatmap swapped. can useful visualizing large datasets compact form. default FALSE. limits limits color scale heatmap. provided, default use range similarity values. cluster_rows Whether cluster rows heatmap. set TRUE, rows rearranged based hierarchical clustering. default FALSE. cluster_columns Whether cluster columns heatmap. set TRUE, columns rearranged based hierarchical clustering. default FALSE. show_row_names Whether show row names heatmap. default FALSE. show_column_names Whether show column names heatmap. default FALSE. row_names_side side heatmap show row names. Options "left" "right". Default "left". column_names_side side heatmap show column names. Options "top" "bottom". provided, Default "top". row_names_rot rotation angle row names. provided, Default 0 degrees. column_names_rot rotation angle column names. provided, default 90 degrees. row_title title row names heatmap. provided, default use query grouping variable. column_title title column names heatmap. Default use reference grouping variable. row_title_side side heatmap show row title. Options "top" "bottom". Default "left". column_title_side side heatmap show column title. Options "left" "right". Default "top". row_title_rot rotation angle row title. Default 90 degrees. column_title_rot rotation angle column title. Default 0 degrees. nlabel maximum number labels show side heatmap. set 0, labels shown. can useful reducing clutter large heatmaps. Default 0. label_cutoff similarity cutoff showing labels. cells similarity values cutoff labels. Default 0. label_by dimension use labeling cells. Options "row" label cells row, "column" label cells column, "" label cells row column. Default "row". label_size size labels. Default 10. heatmap_palette color palette use heatmap. can palettes available circlize package. Default "RdBu". heatmap_palcolor specific colors use heatmap palette. vector color names RGB values. Default NULL. query_group_palette color palette use query group legend. can palettes available circlize package. Default "Chinese". query_group_palcolor specific colors use query group palette. vector color names RGB values. Default NULL. ref_group_palette color palette use reference group legend. can palettes available circlize package. Default "simspec". ref_group_palcolor specific colors use reference group palette. vector color names RGB values. Default NULL. query_annotation vector cell metadata column names assay feature names use highlighting specific cells heatmap. element vector create separate cell annotation track heatmap. provided, cell annotations shown. query_annotation_palette color palette use query cell annotation tracks. can palettes available circlize package. single color palette provided, used cell annotation tracks. multiple color palettes provided, track assigned separate palette. Default "Chinese". query_annotation_palcolor specific colors use query cell annotation palettes. list vectors, vector contains colors specific cell annotation track. single color vector provided, used cell annotation tracks. Default NULL. query_cell_annotation_params Additional parameters customize appearance query cell annotation tracks. list named elements, names correspond parameter names ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap function. conflicting parameters override defaults set function. ref_annotation vector cell metadata column names assay feature names use highlighting specific cells heatmap. element vector create separate cell annotation track heatmap. provided, cell annotations shown. ref_annotation_palette color palette use reference cell annotation tracks. can palettes available circlize package. single color palette provided, used cell annotation tracks. multiple color palettes provided, track assigned separate palette. Default "Chinese". ref_annotation_palcolor specific colors use reference cell annotation palettes. list vectors, vector contains colors specific cell annotation track. single color vector provided, used cell annotation tracks. multiple color vectors provided, track assigned separate color vector. Default NULL. ref_cell_annotation_params Detail description query_cell_annotation_params argument. use_raster Whether use raster images rendering heatmap. set TRUE, heatmap rendered raster image using raster_device argument. Default determined based number rows columns heatmap. raster_device raster device use rendering heatmap. character string specifying device name, "png", "jpeg", "pdf". Default "png". raster_by_magick Whether use magick package rendering rasters. set TRUE, magick package used instead raster package. can useful rendering large heatmaps efficiently. magick package automatically installed installed. height height heatmap specified units. provided, height automatically determined based number rows heatmap default unit. width width heatmap specified units. provided, width automatically determined based number columns heatmap default unit. units units use width height heatmap. Default "inch", Options "mm", "cm", "inch". seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11. ht_params Additional parameters customize appearance heatmap. list named elements, names correspond parameter names ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap function. conflicting parameters override defaults set function. Default list().

title: The Cell Correlation Heatmap — CellCorHeatmap
text: list following elements: plot: heatmap plot ggplot object. features: features used heatmap. simil_matrix: similarity matrix used generate heatmap. simil_name: name similarity metric used generate heatmap. cell_metadata: cell metadata used generate heatmap.

text: srt Seurat object. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . reduction dimensionality reduction use. specified, use reduction returned DefaultReduction. dims Dimensions plot, must two-length numeric vector specifying x- y-dimensions split.Name column meta.data column split plot . Default NULL. cells character vector cell names use. show_na Whether assign color color palette NA group. TRUE, cell points NA level colored bg_color. FALSE, cell points NA level removed plot. show_stat Whether show statistical information plot. pt.size size points plot. pt.alpha transparency data points. Default 1. palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "Chinese". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. bg_color Color value background(NA) points. label Whether label cell groups. label.size Size labels. label.fg Foreground color label. label.bg Background color label. label.bg.r Background ratio label. label_insitu Whether place raw labels (group names) center cells corresponding group. Default FALSE, using numbers instead raw labels. label_repel Logical value indicating whether label repel away center points. label_repulsion Force repulsion overlapping text labels. Default 20. label_point_size Size center points. label_point_color Color center points. label_segment_color Color line segment labels. cells.highlight logical character vector specifying cells highlight plot. TRUE, cells highlighted. FALSE, cells highlighted. Default NULL. cols.highlight Color used highlight cells. sizes.highlight Size highlighted cell points. alpha.highlight Transparency highlighted cell points. stroke.highlight Border width highlighted cell points. add_density Whether add density layer plot. density_color Color density contours lines. density_filled Whether add filled contour bands instead contour lines. density_filled_palette Color palette used fill contour bands. density_filled_palcolor Custom colors used fill contour bands. add_mark Whether add marks around cell groups. Default FALSE. mark_type Type mark add around cell groups. One "hull", "ellipse", "rect", "circle". Default "hull". mark_expand Expansion mark around cell group. Default grid::unit(3, "mm"). mark_alpha Transparency mark. Default 0.1. mark_linetype Line type mark border. Default 1 (solid line). lineages Lineages/pseudotime add plot. specified, curves fitted using stats::loess method. lineages_trim Trim leading trailing data lineages. lineages_span parameter α controls degree smoothing stats::loess method. lineages_palette Color palette used lineages. lineages_palcolor Custom colors used lineages. lineages_arrow Set arrows lineages. See grid::arrow. lineages_linewidth Width fitted curve lines lineages. lineages_line_bg Background color curve lines lineages. lineages_line_bg_stroke Border width curve lines background. lineages_whiskers Whether add whiskers lineages. lineages_whiskers_linewidth Width whiskers lineages. lineages_whiskers_alpha Transparency whiskers lineages. stat.name metadata column stat. stat_type Set stat types ("percent" "count"). stat_plot_type Set statistical plot type. stat_plot_position Position adjustment statistical plot. stat_plot_size Set statistical plot size. Default 0.2. stat_plot_palette Color palette used statistical plot. stat_palcolor Custom colors used statistical plot stat_plot_alpha Transparency statistical plot. stat_plot_label Whether add labels statistical plot. stat_plot_label_size Label size statistical plot. graph Specify graph name add edges cell neighbors plot. edge_size Size edges. edge_alpha Transparency edges. edge_color Color edges. paga Specify calculated paga results add PAGA graph layer plot. paga_type PAGA plot type. "connectivities" "connectivities_tree". paga_node_size Size nodes PAGA plot. paga_edge_threshold Threshold edge connectivities PAGA plot. paga_edge_size Size edges PAGA plot. paga_edge_color Color edges PAGA plot. paga_edge_alpha Transparency edges PAGA plot. paga_transition_threshold Threshold transition edges PAGA plot. paga_transition_size Size transition edges PAGA plot. paga_transition_color Color transition edges PAGA plot. paga_transition_alpha Transparency transition edges PAGA plot. paga_show_transition Whether show transitions edges. velocity Specify calculated RNA velocity mode add velocity layer plot. velocity_plot_type Set velocity plot type. velocity_n_neighbors Set number neighbors used velocity plot. velocity_density Set density value used velocity plot. velocity_smooth Set smooth value used velocity plot. velocity_scale Set scale value used velocity plot. velocity_min_mass Set min_mass value used velocity plot. velocity_cutoff_perc Set cutoff_perc value used velocity plot. velocity_arrow_color Color arrows velocity plot. velocity_arrow_angle Angle arrows velocity plot. streamline_L Typical length streamline x y units streamline_minL Minimum length segments show. streamline_res Resolution parameter (higher numbers increases resolution). streamline_n Number points draw. streamline_width Size streamline. streamline_alpha Transparency streamline. streamline_color Color streamline. streamline_palette Color palette used streamline. streamline_palcolor Custom colors used streamline. streamline_bg_color Background color streamline. streamline_bg_stroke Border width streamline background. hex Whether chane plot type point hexagonal bin. hex.linewidth Border width hexagonal bins. hex.count Whether show cell counts hexagonal bin. hex.bins Number hexagonal bins. hex.binwidth Hexagonal bin width. raster Convert points raster format. Default NULL, automatically rasterizes plotting 100,000 cells. raster.dpi Pixel resolution rasterized plots. Default c(512, 512). aspect.ratio Aspect ratio panel. Default 1. title text title. Default NULL. subtitle text subtitle plot displayed title. Default NULL. xlab x-axis label plot. Default NULL. ylab y-axis label plot. Default NULL. legend.position position legends, one "none", "left", "right", "bottom", "top". Default "right". legend.direction direction legend plot. Can one "vertical" "horizontal". legend.title Title legend. Default NULL, uses group name. theme_use Theme used. Can character string theme function. Default "theme_scop". theme_args arguments passed theme_use. Default list(). combine Combine plots single patchwork object. FALSE, return list ggplot objects. nrow Number rows combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. ncol Number columns combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. byrow Whether arrange plots row combined plot. title: 3D-Dimensional reduction plot for cell classification visualization. — CellDimPlot3D
text: srt Seurat object. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . reduction dimensionality reduction use. specified, use reduction returned DefaultReduction. dims Dimensions plot, must three-length numeric vector specifying x-, y- z-dimensions axis_labs character vector length 3 indicating labels axes. palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "Chinese". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. bg_color Color value background(NA) points. pt.size size points plot. cells.highlight logical character vector specifying cells highlight plot. TRUE, cells highlighted. FALSE, cells highlighted. Default NULL. cols.highlight Color used highlight cells. shape.highlight Shape cell highlight. See scattergl-marker-symbol sizes.highlight Size highlighted cell points. lineages Lineages/pseudotime add plot. specified, curves fitted using stats::loess method. lineages_palette Color palette used lineages. span span loess smoother lineages line. width Width pixels, defaults automatic sizing. height Height pixels, defaults automatic sizing. save name file save plot . Must end ".html". force Whether force drawing regardless maximum levels cell group greater 100. Default FALSE.

text: function performs cell scoring Seurat object. calculates scores given set features adds scores metadata Seurat object.

title: Cell scoring — CellScoring
code: CellScoring(   srt,   features = NULL,   layer = "data",   assay = NULL,   split.by = NULL,   IDtype = "symbol",   species = "Homo_sapiens",   db = "GO_BP",   termnames = NULL,   db_update = FALSE,   db_version = "latest",   convert_species = TRUE,   Ensembl_version = NULL,   mirror = NULL,   minGSSize = 10,   maxGSSize = 500,   method = "Seurat",   classification = TRUE,   name = "",   new_assay = FALSE,   seed = 11,   cores = 1,   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: Cell scoring — CellScoring
text: srt Seurat object. features named list feature lists scoring. NULL, db used create features sets. layer layer use. Default data. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. split.Name column meta.data column split plot . Default NULL. IDtype character vector specifying type gene IDs srt object geneID argument. argument used convert gene IDs different type IDtype different result_IDtype. species character vector specifying species gene annotation databases prepared. Can "Homo_sapiens" "Mus_musculus". db character vector specifying annotation sources included gene annotation databases. Can one "GO", "GO_BP", "GO_CC", "GO_MF", "KEGG", "WikiPathway", "Reactome", "CORUM", "MP", "", "HPO", "PFAM", "CSPA", "Surfaceome", "SPRomeDB", "VerSeDa", "TFLink", "hTFtarget", "TRRUST", "JASPAR", "ENCODE", "MSigDB", "CellTalk", "CellChat", "Chromosome", "GeneType", "Enzyme", "TF". termnames vector term names used database. Default NULL, case features database used. db_update Whether gene annotation databases forcefully updated. set FALSE, function attempt load cached databases instead. Default FALSE. db_version character vector specifying version gene annotation databases retrieved. Default "latest". convert_species Whether use species-converted database annotation missing specified species. Default TRUE. Ensembl_version integer specifying Ensembl version. Default NULL. NULL, latest version used. mirror Specify Ensembl mirror connect . valid options "www", "uswest", "useast", "asia". minGSSize minimum size gene set considered enrichment analysis. maxGSSize maximum size gene set considered enrichment analysis. method method use scoring. Can "Seurat", "AUCell", "UCell". Default "Seurat". classification Whether perform classification based scores. Default TRUE. name name assay store scores . used new_assay TRUE. Default "". new_assay Whether create new assay storing scores. Default FALSE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11. cores number cores use parallelization foreach::foreach. Default 1. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. ... Additional arguments passed scoring methods.

title: Statistical plot of cells — CellStatPlot
text: srt Seurat object. stat.character vector specifying features plot. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . split.Name column meta.data column split plot . Default NULL. bg.character vector specifying variable use background color. Default NULL. cells character vector cell names use. Default NULL. flip logical specifying whether flip plot vertically. Default FALSE. NA_color color use missing values. NA_stat Whether include missing values plot. Default TRUE. keep_empty Whether keep empty levels plot. Default FALSE. individual Whether create individual plots group. Default FALSE. stat_level level(s) variable(s) specified stat.include plot. Default NULL. plot_type string specifying type plot create. Possible values "violin", "box", "bar", "dot", "col". Default "violin". stat_type type statistic compute plot. Can one "percent" "count". position position adjustment plot. Can one "stack" "dodge". palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "Chinese". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. alpha transparency plot. Default 1. bg_palette string specifying color palette use background. Default "Chinese". bg_palcolor character vector specifying specific colors use background. Default NULL. bg_alpha transparency background. Default 0.2. label Whether add labels plot. Default FALSE. label.size size labels. label.fg foreground color labels. label.bg background color labels. label.bg.r radius rounded corners label background. aspect.ratio Aspect ratio panel. Default NULL. title text title. Default NULL. subtitle text subtitle plot displayed title. Default NULL. xlab x-axis label plot. Default NULL. ylab string specifying label y-axis. Default "Expression level". legend.position position legends, one "none", "left", "right", "bottom", "top". Default "right". legend.direction direction legend plot. Can one "vertical" "horizontal". theme_use Theme used. Can character string theme function. Default "theme_scop". theme_args arguments passed theme_use. Default list(). combine Combine plots single patchwork object. FALSE, return list ggplot objects. nrow Number rows combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. ncol Number columns combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. byrow Whether arrange plots row combined plot. Default TRUE. force Whether force drawing regardless maximum levels cell group greater 100. Default FALSE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

what: Check and preprocess a list of Seurat objects — CheckDataList
title: Check and preprocess a list of Seurat objects — CheckDataList
text: function checks preprocesses list Seurat objects. performs various checks input, including verification input types, assay type consistency, feature name consistency, batch column consistency. also performs data normalization variable feature finding based specified parameters. Finally, prepares data integration analysis based highly variable features.

title: Check and preprocess a list of Seurat objects — CheckDataList
code: CheckDataList(   srt_list,   batch,   assay = NULL,   do_normalization = NULL,   normalization_method = "LogNormalize",   do_HVF_finding = TRUE,   HVF_source = "separate",   HVF_method = "vst",   nHVF = 2000,   HVF_min_intersection = 1,   HVF = NULL,   vars_to_regress = NULL,   verbose = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: Check and preprocess a list of Seurat objects — CheckDataList
text: srt_list list Seurat objects checked preprocessed. batch character string specifying batch variable name. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. do_normalization Whether data normalization performed. Default TRUE. normalization_method normalization method used. Possible values "LogNormalize", "SCT", "TFIDF". Default "LogNormalize". do_HVF_finding Whether perform high variable feature finding. TRUE, function force find highly variable features (HVF) using specified HVF method. HVF_source source highly variable features. Possible values "global" "separate". Default "separate". HVF_method method use finding highly variable features. Options "vst", "mvp", "disp". Default "vst". nHVF number highly variable features select. NULL, highly variable features used. Default 2000. HVF_min_intersection feature needs present batches minimum number times order considered highly variable. Default 1. HVF vector feature names use highly variable features. NULL, function use highly variable features identified HVF method. vars_to_regress vector variable names include additional regression variables. Default NULL. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Check and preprocess a list of Seurat objects — CheckDataList
text: list containing preprocessed Seurat objects, highly variable features, assay name, type assay.

title: Check and preprocess a merged seurat object — CheckDataMerge
code: CheckDataMerge(   srt_merge,   batch = NULL,   assay = NULL,   do_normalization = NULL,   normalization_method = "LogNormalize",   do_HVF_finding = TRUE,   HVF_source = "separate",   HVF_method = "vst",   nHVF = 2000,   HVF_min_intersection = 1,   HVF = NULL,   vars_to_regress = NULL,   verbose = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: Check and preprocess a merged seurat object — CheckDataMerge
text: srt_merge merged `Seurat` object includes batch information. batch character string specifying batch variable name. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. do_normalization Whether data normalization performed. Default TRUE. normalization_method normalization method used. Possible values "LogNormalize", "SCT", "TFIDF". Default "LogNormalize". do_HVF_finding Whether perform high variable feature finding. TRUE, function force find highly variable features (HVF) using specified HVF method. HVF_source source highly variable features. Possible values "global" "separate". Default "separate". HVF_method method use finding highly variable features. Options "vst", "mvp", "disp". Default "vst". nHVF number highly variable features select. NULL, highly variable features used. Default 2000. HVF_min_intersection feature needs present batches minimum number times order considered highly variable. Default 1. HVF vector feature names use highly variable features. NULL, function use highly variable features identified HVF method. vars_to_regress vector variable names include additional regression variables. Default NULL. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

what: Check and report the type of data in Seurat object — CheckDataType
title: Check and report the type of data in Seurat object — CheckDataType
text: function checks returns string indicating type data. checks presence infinite values, negative values, whether values floats integers.

title: Check and report the type of data in Seurat object — CheckDataType

title: Check and report the type of data in Seurat object — CheckDataType
text: object Seurat object matrix. ... message print. layer layer use. Default data. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Check and report the type of data in Seurat object — CheckDataType
text: string indicating type data. Possible values : "raw_counts", "log_normalized_counts", "raw_normalized_counts", "unknown".

title: The ComBat integration function — ComBat_integrate
text: ComBat integration function

title: The ComBat integration function — ComBat_integrate
code: ComBat_integrate(   srt_merge = NULL,   batch = NULL,   append = TRUE,   srt_list = NULL,   assay = NULL,   do_normalization = NULL,   normalization_method = "LogNormalize",   do_HVF_finding = TRUE,   HVF_source = "separate",   HVF_method = "vst",   nHVF = 2000,   HVF_min_intersection = 1,   HVF = NULL,   do_scaling = TRUE,   vars_to_regress = NULL,   regression_model = "linear",   scale_within_batch = FALSE,   linear_reduction = "pca",   linear_reduction_dims = 50,   linear_reduction_dims_use = NULL,   linear_reduction_params = list(),   force_linear_reduction = FALSE,   nonlinear_reduction = "umap",   nonlinear_reduction_dims = c(2, 3),   nonlinear_reduction_params = list(),   force_nonlinear_reduction = TRUE,   neighbor_metric = "euclidean",   neighbor_k = 20L,   cluster_algorithm = "louvain",   cluster_resolution = 0.6,   ComBat_params = list(),   verbose = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: The ComBat integration function — ComBat_integrate
text: srt_merge merged `Seurat` object includes batch information. batch character string specifying batch variable name. append Whether integrated data appended original Seurat object (srt_merge). Default TRUE. srt_list list Seurat objects checked preprocessed. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. do_normalization Whether data normalization performed. Default TRUE. normalization_method normalization method used. Possible values "LogNormalize", "SCT", "TFIDF". Default "LogNormalize". do_HVF_finding Whether perform high variable feature finding. TRUE, function force find highly variable features (HVF) using specified HVF method. HVF_source source highly variable features. Possible values "global" "separate". Default "separate". HVF_method method use finding highly variable features. Options "vst", "mvp", "disp". Default "vst". nHVF number highly variable features select. NULL, highly variable features used. Default 2000. HVF_min_intersection feature needs present batches minimum number times order considered highly variable. Default 1. HVF vector feature names use highly variable features. NULL, function use highly variable features identified HVF method. do_scaling Whether perform scaling. TRUE, function force scale data using Seurat::ScaleData function. vars_to_regress vector variable names include additional regression variables. Default NULL. regression_model regression model use scaling. Options "linear", "poisson", "negativebinomial". Default "linear". scale_within_batch Whether scale data within batch. valid integration_method one "Uncorrected", "Seurat", "MNN", "Harmony", "BBKNN", "CSS", "ComBat". linear_reduction linear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "pca", "svd", "ica", "nmf", "mds", "glmpca". Default "pca". linear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep linear dimensionality reduction. Default 50. linear_reduction_dims_use dimensions use downstream analysis. NULL, estimated dimensions stored linear reduction used available; otherwise, first 50 dimensions used fallback. linear_reduction_params list parameters pass linear dimensionality reduction method. force_linear_reduction Whether force linear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". nonlinear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep nonlinear dimensionality reduction. vector provided, different numbers dimensions can specified method. Default c(2, 3). nonlinear_reduction_params list parameters pass nonlinear dimensionality reduction method. force_nonlinear_reduction Whether force nonlinear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. Default TRUE. neighbor_metric distance metric use finding neighbors. Options "euclidean", "cosine", "manhattan", "hamming". Default "euclidean". neighbor_k number nearest neighbors use finding neighbors. Default 20. cluster_algorithm clustering algorithm use. Options "louvain", "slm", "leiden". Default "louvain". cluster_resolution resolution parameter use clustering. Larger values result fewer clusters. Default 0.6. ComBat_params list parameters sva::ComBat function. Default `list()`. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

Default TRUE. srt_list list Seurat objects checked preprocessed. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. do_normalization Whether data normalization performed. title: The Coralysis integration function — Coralysis_integrate
text: srt_merge merged `Seurat` object includes batch information. batch character string specifying batch variable name. append Whether integrated data appended original Seurat object (srt_merge). Default TRUE. srt_list list Seurat objects checked preprocessed. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. do_normalization Whether data normalization performed. Default TRUE. normalization_method normalization method used. Possible values "LogNormalize", "SCT", "TFIDF". Default "LogNormalize". do_HVF_finding Whether perform high variable feature finding. TRUE, function force find highly variable features (HVF) using specified HVF method. HVF_source source highly variable features. Possible values "global" "separate". Default "separate". HVF_method method use finding highly variable features. Options "vst", "mvp", "disp". Default "vst". nHVF number highly variable features select. NULL, highly variable features used. Default 2000. HVF_min_intersection feature needs present batches minimum number times order considered highly variable. Default 1. HVF vector feature names use highly variable features. NULL, function use highly variable features identified HVF method. coralysis_dims_use vector specifying dimensions returned Coralysis PCA utilized downstream cell cluster finding nonlinear reduction. `NULL`, available Coralysis PCA dimensions used default. nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". nonlinear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep nonlinear dimensionality reduction. vector provided, different numbers dimensions can specified method. Default c(2, 3). nonlinear_reduction_params list parameters pass nonlinear dimensionality reduction method. force_nonlinear_reduction Whether force nonlinear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. Default TRUE. neighbor_metric distance metric use finding neighbors. Options "euclidean", "cosine", "manhattan", "hamming". Default "euclidean". neighbor_k number nearest neighbors use finding neighbors. Default 20. cluster_algorithm clustering algorithm use. Options "louvain", "slm", "leiden". Default "louvain". cluster_resolution resolution parameter use clustering. Larger values result fewer clusters. Default 0.6. cores Number threads passed [Coralysis::RunParallelDivisiveICP]. PrepareData_params list parameters [Coralysis::PrepareData]. Default `list()`. RunParallelDivisiveICP_params list parameters [Coralysis::RunParallelDivisiveICP]. Default `list()`. RunPCA_params list parameters [Coralysis::RunPCA]. Default `list()`. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Prefetch cell cycle genes — CycGenePrefetch
text: species Latin names animals, .e., "Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus" Ensembl_version integer specifying Ensembl version. Default NULL. NULL, latest version used. mirror Specify Ensembl mirror connect . valid options "www", "uswest", "useast", "asia". max_tries maximum number attempts connect BioMart service. use_cached_gene Whether use previously cached cell cycle gene conversion results species. Default TRUE. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Plot CytoTRACE 2 Results — CytoTRACEPlot
text: Plot CytoTRACE 2 Results

title: Plot CytoTRACE 2 Results — CytoTRACEPlot
code: CytoTRACEPlot(   srt,   reduction = NULL,   group.by = NULL,   combine = TRUE,   nrow = NULL,   ncol = NULL,   byrow = TRUE,   pt.size = NULL,   pt.alpha = 1,   palette = "Chinese",   palcolor = NULL,   theme_use = "theme_scop",   theme_args = list(),   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: Plot CytoTRACE 2 Results — CytoTRACEPlot
text: srt Seurat object. reduction dimensionality reduction use. specified, use reduction returned DefaultReduction. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . combine Combine plots single patchwork object. FALSE, return list ggplot objects. nrow Number rows combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. ncol Number columns combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. byrow Whether arrange plots row combined plot. Default TRUE. pt.size size points plot. pt.alpha transparency data points. Default 1. palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "Chinese". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. theme_use Theme used. Can character string theme function. Default "theme_scop". theme_args arguments passed theme_use. Default list(). verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. ... Additional arguments passed CellDimPlot FeatureDimPlot.

title: Plot CytoTRACE 2 Results — CytoTRACEPlot

title: DEtest Manhattan Plot — DEtestManhattanPlot
text: srt object class Seurat containing results differential expression analysis. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . test.use character string specifying type statistical test use. Default "wilcox". res data.frame data.table differential expression results. res provided, srt ignored. data.frame must contain columns: gene, group1 (factor character), avg_log2FC, p_val_adj, optionally pct.1 pct.2 calculating diff_pct. DE_threshold character string specifying threshold differential expression (used highlight significant genes plot types). Default "avg_log2FC > 0 & p_val_adj < 0.05". group_palette Palette cell types (groups) Manhattan plot. Default "Chinese". group_palcolor Custom colors cell types (groups) Manhattan plot. Default NULL. pt.size size points. Default 1. pt.alpha transparency data points. Default 1. cols.highlight character string specifying color highlighted points. Default "black". sizes.highlight size highlighted points. Default 1. alpha.highlight transparency highlighted points. Default 1. stroke.highlight stroke width highlighted points. Default 0.5. nlabel integer value specifying number labeled points per group. Default 5. features_label character vector specifying feature labels plot. Default NULL. label.fg character string specifying color labels' foreground. Default "black". label.bg character string specifying color labels' background. Default "white". label.bg.r radius rounding labels' background. Default 0.1. label.size size labels. Default 4. palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "RdBu". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. theme_use Theme use plot. Default "theme_scop". theme_args list additional arguments pass theme function. Default list(). manhattan.bg Background color Manhattan plot. Default "white". jitter_width Horizontal jitter range points Manhattan plot. Default 0.5. jitter_height Vertical jitter range points Manhattan plot. Default 0.4. aspect.ratio Aspect ratio panel. Default NULL. xlab character string specifying x-axis label. ylab character string specifying y-axis label.
