text: function generates PAGA plot based given Seurat object PAGA result.

title: PAGA plot — PAGAPlot
code: PAGAPlot(   srt,   paga = srt@misc$paga,   type = "connectivities",   reduction = NULL,   dims = c(1, 2),   cells = NULL,   show_transition = FALSE,   node_palette = "Chinese",   node_palcolor = NULL,   node_size = 4,   node_alpha = 1,   node_highlight = NULL,   node_highlight_color = "red",   label = FALSE,   label.size = 3.5,   label.fg = "white",   label.bg = "black",   label.bg.r = 0.1,   label_insitu = FALSE,   label_repel = FALSE,   label_repulsion = 20,   label_point_size = 1,   label_point_color = "black",   label_segment_color = "black",   edge_threshold = 0.01,   edge_line = c("straight", "curved"),   edge_line_curvature = 0.3,   edge_line_angle = 90,   edge_size = c(0.2, 1),   edge_color = "grey40",   edge_alpha = 0.5,   edge_shorten = 0,   edge_offset = 0,   edge_highlight = NULL,   edge_highlight_color = "red",   transition_threshold = 0.01,   transition_line = c("straight", "curved"),   transition_line_curvature = 0.3,   transition_line_angle = 90,   transition_size = c(0.2, 1),   transition_color = "black",   transition_alpha = 1,   transition_arrow_type = "closed",   transition_arrow_angle = 20,   transition_arrow_length = grid::unit(0.02, "npc"),   transition_shorten = 0.05,   transition_offset = 0,   transition_highlight = NULL,   transition_highlight_color = "red",   aspect.ratio = 1,   title = "PAGA",   subtitle = NULL,   xlab = NULL,   ylab = NULL,   legend.position = "right",   legend.direction = "vertical",   theme_use = "theme_scop",   theme_args = list(),   return_layer = FALSE )

title: PAGA plot — PAGAPlot
text: srt Seurat object. paga PAGA result Seurat object. Default srt@misc$paga. type type plot generate. Possible values "connectivities" (default) "connectivities_tree". reduction dimensionality reduction use. specified, use reduction returned DefaultReduction. dims Dimensions plot, must two-length numeric vector specifying x- y-dimensions cells character vector cell names use. show_transition Whether display transitions different cell states. Default FALSE. node_palette character vector specifying name color palette node groups. node_palcolor character vector specifying names colors node group. node_size numeric value column name node specifying size nodes. node_alpha numeric value column name node specifying transparency nodes. node_highlight character vector specifying names nodes highlight. node_highlight_color character vector specifying color highlighting nodes. label Whether label cell groups. label.size Size labels. label.fg Foreground color label. label.bg Background color label. label.bg.r Background ratio label. label_insitu Whether place raw labels (group names) center cells corresponding group. Default FALSE, using numbers instead raw labels. label_repel Logical value indicating whether label repel away center points. label_repulsion Force repulsion overlapping text labels. Default 20. label_point_size Size center points. label_point_color Color center points. label_segment_color Color line segment labels. edge_threshold threshold removing edges. edge_line character vector specifying type line edges (straight, curved). edge_line_curvature curvature curved edges. edge_line_angle angle curved edges. edge_size Size edges. edge_color Color edges. edge_alpha Transparency edges. edge_shorten length edge shorten. edge_offset length edge offset. edge_highlight character vector specifying names edges highlight. edge_highlight_color character vector specifying color highlighting edges. transition_threshold threshold removing transitions. transition_line character vector specifying type line transitions (straight, curved). transition_line_curvature curvature curved transitions. transition_line_angle angle curved transitions. transition_size numeric vector specifying range transition sizes. transition_color character vector specifying color transitions. transition_alpha transparency transitions. transition_arrow_type character vector specifying type arrow transitions (closed, open). transition_arrow_angle angle transition arrow. transition_arrow_length length transition arrow. transition_shorten length transition shorten. transition_offset length transition offset. transition_highlight character vector specifying names transitions highlight. transition_highlight_color character vector specifying color highlighting transitions. aspect.ratio Aspect ratio panel. Default 1. title text title. Default "PAGA". subtitle text subtitle plot displayed title. Default NULL. xlab x-axis label plot. Default NULL. ylab y-axis label plot. Default NULL. legend.position position legends, one "none", "left", "right", "bottom", "top". Default "right". legend.direction direction legend plot. Can one "vertical" "horizontal". theme_use Theme used. Can character string theme function. Default "theme_scop". theme_args arguments passed theme_use. Default list(). return_layer Whether return plot layers list. Defaults FALSE.

title: PAGA plot — PAGAPlot
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ data(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- RunPAGA(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "SubCellType",   linear_reduction = "PCA",   nonlinear_reduction = "UMAP",   return_seurat = TRUE )  PAGAPlot(pancreas_sub)  PAGAPlot(   pancreas_sub,   type = "connectivities_tree" )  PAGAPlot(   pancreas_sub,   reduction = "PCA" )  PAGAPlot(   pancreas_sub,   reduction = "PAGAUMAP2D" )  PAGAPlot(   pancreas_sub,   edge_shorten = 0.05 )  PAGAPlot(   pancreas_sub,   label = TRUE )  PAGAPlot(   pancreas_sub,   label = TRUE,   label_insitu = TRUE )  PAGAPlot(   pancreas_sub,   label = TRUE,   label_insitu = TRUE,   label_repel = TRUE )  PAGAPlot(   pancreas_sub,   edge_line = "curved" )  PAGAPlot(   pancreas_sub,   node_size = "GroupSize" )  PAGAPlot(   pancreas_sub,   node_highlight = "Ductal" )  PAGAPlot(   pancreas_sub,   edge_highlight = paste(     "Pre-endocrine",     levels(pancreas_sub$SubCellType),     sep = "-"   ) )  pancreas_sub <- RunSCVELO(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "SubCellType",   linear_reduction = "PCA",   nonlinear_reduction = "UMAP",   return_seurat = TRUE )  PAGAPlot(   pancreas_sub,   show_transition = TRUE )  PAGAPlot(   pancreas_sub,   show_transition = TRUE,   transition_offset = 0.02 ) } # }

what: Prepare the gene annotation databases — PrepareDB
title: Prepare the gene annotation databases — PrepareDB
text: function prepares gene annotation databases given species set annotation sources. retrieves necessary information various annotation packages external resources organizes list. list contains annotation data specified annotation source.

title: Prepare the gene annotation databases — PrepareDB
code: PrepareDB(   species = c("Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus"),   db = c("GO", "GO_BP", "GO_CC", "GO_MF", "KEGG", "WikiPathway", "Reactome", "CORUM",     "MP", "DO", "HPO", "PFAM", "CSPA", "Surfaceome", "SPRomeDB", "VerSeDa", "TFLink",     "hTFtarget", "TRRUST", "JASPAR", "ENCODE", "MSigDB", "CellTalk", "CellChat",     "Chromosome", "GeneType", "Enzyme", "TF"),   db_IDtypes = c("symbol", "entrez_id", "ensembl_id"),   db_version = "latest",   db_update = FALSE,   convert_species = TRUE,   Ensembl_version = NULL,   mirror = NULL,   biomart = NULL,   max_tries = 5,   custom_TERM2GENE = NULL,   custom_TERM2NAME = NULL,   custom_species = NULL,   custom_IDtype = NULL,   custom_version = NULL,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Prepare the gene annotation databases — PrepareDB
text: species character vector specifying species gene annotation databases prepared. Can "Homo_sapiens" "Mus_musculus". db character vector specifying annotation sources included gene annotation databases. Can one "GO", "GO_BP", "GO_CC", "GO_MF", "KEGG", "WikiPathway", "Reactome", "CORUM", "MP", "", "HPO", "PFAM", "CSPA", "Surfaceome", "SPRomeDB", "VerSeDa", "TFLink", "hTFtarget", "TRRUST", "JASPAR", "ENCODE", "MSigDB", "CellTalk", "CellChat", "Chromosome", "GeneType", "Enzyme", "TF". db_IDtypes character vector specifying desired ID types used gene identifiers gene annotation databases. Default c("symbol", "entrez_id", "ensembl_id"). db_version character vector specifying version gene annotation databases retrieved. Default "latest". db_update Whether gene annotation databases forcefully updated. set FALSE, function attempt load cached databases instead. Default FALSE. convert_species Whether use species-converted database annotation missing specified species. Default TRUE. Ensembl_version integer specifying Ensembl version. Default NULL. NULL, latest version used. mirror Specify Ensembl mirror connect . valid options "www", "uswest", "useast", "asia". biomart name BioMart database want connect . Possible options include "ensembl", "protists_mart", "fungi_mart", "plants_mart". max_tries maximum number attempts connect BioMart service. custom_TERM2GENE data frame containing custom TERM2GENE mapping specified species annotation source. Default NULL. custom_TERM2NAME data frame containing custom TERM2NAME mapping specified species annotation source. Default NULL. custom_species character vector specifying species name used custom database. Default NULL. custom_IDtype character vector specifying ID type used custom database. Default NULL. custom_version character vector specifying version used custom database. Default NULL. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Prepare the gene annotation databases — PrepareDB
text: list containing prepared gene annotation databases: TERM2GENE: mapping gene identifiers terms. TERM2NAME: mapping terms names. semData: semantic similarity data gene sets (Gene Ontology terms).

title: Prepare the gene annotation databases — PrepareDB
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ db_list <- PrepareDB(   species = "Homo_sapiens",   db = "GO_BP" ) ListDB(   species = "Homo_sapiens",   db = "GO_BP" ) head(   db_list[["Homo_sapiens"]][["GO_BP"]][["TERM2GENE"]] )  # Based on homologous gene conversion, # prepare a gene annotation database that originally does not exist in the species. db_list <- PrepareDB(   species = "Homo_sapiens",   db = "MP" ) ListDB(   species = "Homo_sapiens",   db = "MP" ) head(   db_list[["Homo_sapiens"]][["MP"]][["TERM2GENE"]] )  # Prepare databases for other species db_list <- PrepareDB(   species = "Macaca_fascicularis",   db = "GO_BP" ) ListDB(   species = "Macaca_fascicularis",   db = "GO_BP" ) head(   db_list[["Macaca_fascicularis"]][["GO_BP"]][["TERM2GENE"]] )  db_list <- PrepareDB(   species = "Saccharomyces_cerevisiae",   db = "GO_BP" ) ListDB(   species = "Saccharomyces_cerevisiae",   db = "GO_BP" ) head(   db_list[["Saccharomyces_cerevisiae"]][["GO_BP"]][["TERM2GENE"]] )  # Prepare databases for Arabidopsis (plant) db_list <- PrepareDB(   species = "Arabidopsis_thaliana",   db = c(     "GO_BP", "GO_CC", "GO_MF", "KEGG", "WikiPathway",     "ENZYME", "Chromosome"   ),   biomart = "plants_mart" ) head(   db_list[["Arabidopsis_thaliana"]][["KEGG"]][["TERM2GENE"]] )  # You can also build a custom database based on the gene sets you have ccgenes <- CycGenePrefetch("Homo_sapiens") custom_TERM2GENE <- rbind(   data.frame(     term = "S_genes",     gene = ccgenes[["cc_S_genes"]]   ),   data.frame(     term = "G2M_genes",     gene = ccgenes[["cc_G2M_genes"]]   ) ) str(custom_TERM2GENE)  # Set convert_species = TRUE to build a custom database for both species, # with the name "CellCycle" db_list <- PrepareDB(   species = c("Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus"),   db = "CellCycle",   convert_species = TRUE,   custom_TERM2GENE = custom_TERM2GENE,   custom_species = "Homo_sapiens",   custom_IDtype = "symbol",   custom_version = "Seurat_v5" ) ListDB(db = "CellCycle")  db_list <- PrepareDB(species = "Mus_musculus", db = "CellCycle") head(   db_list[["Mus_musculus"]][["CellCycle"]][["TERM2GENE"]] ) } # }

title: Prepare the python environment — PrepareEnv
text: Prepare python environment installing required dependencies setting environment.

title: Prepare the python environment — PrepareEnv
code: PrepareEnv(   envname = NULL,   conda = "auto",   miniconda_repo = "https://repo.anaconda.com/miniconda",   version = if (is_windows()) "3.11-1" else "3.10-1",   force = FALSE,   pip_options = character(),   ... )

title: Prepare the python environment — PrepareEnv
text: envname name conda environment. NULL, environment name set "scop_env". Default NULL. conda path conda executable. Use "auto" allow automatically finding appropriate conda binary. miniconda_repo Repository URL miniconda. Default https://repo.anaconda.com/miniconda. version Python version. Default "3.10-1" macOS Unix "3.11-1" Windows. force Whether force recreation environment. TRUE, existing environment removed recreated. Default FALSE. pip_options Additional command line arguments passed uv/pip installing pip packages. ... Additional arguments passed package installation functions.

what: Prepare Seurat objects for the SCExplorer — PrepareSCExplorer
title: Prepare Seurat objects for the SCExplorer — PrepareSCExplorer
text: function prepares one multiple Seurat objects SCExplorer app. takes Seurat object list Seurat objects input outputs two hdf5 files: one data one metadata.

title: Prepare Seurat objects for the SCExplorer — PrepareSCExplorer
code: PrepareSCExplorer(   object,   base_dir = "SCExplorer",   data_file = "data.hdf5",   meta_file = "meta.hdf5",   assays = "RNA",   layers = c("counts", "data"),   ignore_nlevel = 100,   write_tools = FALSE,   write_misc = FALSE,   compression_level = 6,   overwrite = FALSE )

title: Prepare Seurat objects for the SCExplorer — PrepareSCExplorer
text: object Seurat object list Seurat objects. base_dir base directory SCExplorer hdf5 files written. Default "SCExplorer". data_file Path output data file. provided, file named "data.hdf5" current directory. meta_file Path output meta file. provided, file named "meta.hdf5" current directory. assays assays include data file. Default "RNA". layers layers include data file. Default "data". ignore_nlevel number levels metadata field ignored. Default 100. write_tools Whether write tools information meta file. Default FALSE. write_misc Whether write miscellaneous information meta file. Default FALSE. compression_level Compression level HDF5 dataset. Default 6. overwrite Whether overwrite existing data data file. Default TRUE.

title: Prepare Seurat objects for the SCExplorer — PrepareSCExplorer
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ data(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub) PrepareSCExplorer(pancreas_sub, base_dir = "./SCExplorer") } # }

title: Projection Plot — ProjectionPlot
text: function generates projection plot, can used compare two groups cells dimensionality reduction space.

title: Projection Plot — ProjectionPlot
code: ProjectionPlot(   srt_query,   srt_ref,   query_group = NULL,   ref_group = NULL,   query_reduction = "ref.embeddings",   ref_reduction = srt_query[[query_reduction]]@misc[["reduction.model"]] %||% NULL,   query_param = list(palette = "Set1", cells.highlight = TRUE),   ref_param = list(palette = "Chinese"),   xlim = NULL,   ylim = NULL,   pt.size = 0.8,   stroke.highlight = 0.5 )

title: Projection Plot — ProjectionPlot
text: srt_query object class Seurat annotated cell types. srt_ref Seurat object count matrix representing reference object. provided, similarities calculated cells query reference objects. provided, similarities calculated within query object. query_group grouping variable query group cells. ref_group grouping variable reference group cells. query_reduction name reduction query group cells. ref_reduction name reduction reference group cells. query_param list parameters customizing query group plot. Available parameters: palette (color palette groups) cells.highlight (whether highlight cells). ref_param list parameters customizing reference group plot. Available parameters: palette (color palette groups) cells.highlight (whether highlight cells). xlim x-axis limits plot. provided, limits calculated based data. ylim y-axis limits plot. provided, limits calculated based data. pt.size size points plot. stroke.highlight size stroke highlight cells.

title: Proportion Test Plot — ProportionTestPlot
text: Generate proportion test plots based results RunProportionTest.

title: Proportion Test Plot — ProportionTestPlot
code: ProportionTestPlot(   srt,   comparison = NULL,   FDR_threshold = 0.05,   log2FD_threshold = log2(1.5),   order_by = c("value", "name"),   pt.size = 1,   pt.alpha = 1,   cols.sig = "red",   cols.ns = "grey",   aspect.ratio = NULL,   xlab = "Cell Type",   ylab = "log2 (FD)",   theme_use = "theme_scop",   theme_args = list(),   legend.position = "bottom",   legend.direction = "vertical",   legend.title = "Significance",   combine = TRUE,   nrow = NULL,   ncol = NULL,   byrow = TRUE )

title: Proportion Test Plot — ProportionTestPlot
text: srt Seurat object containing proportion test results. comparison character string specifying comparison plot. NULL, plots comparisons. FDR_threshold FDR value cutoff significance. log2FD_threshold Absolute value log2FD cutoff significance. order_by Method order clusters. Options: "name" (alphabetical), "value" (log2FD value). pt.size size points. Default 1. pt.alpha transparency data points. Default 1. cols.sig Color significant points confidence intervals. cols.ns Color non-significant points confidence intervals. aspect.ratio Aspect ratio panel. xlab character string specifying x-axis label. Default "Cell Type". ylab character string specifying y-axis label. Default "log2 (FD)". theme_use Theme used. Can character string theme function. Default "theme_scop". theme_args arguments passed theme_use. Default list(). legend.position position legends, one "none", "left", "right", "bottom", "top". Default "bottom". legend.direction direction legend plot. Can one "vertical" "horizontal". legend.title Title legend. combine Combine plots single patchwork object. FALSE, return list ggplot objects. nrow Number rows combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. ncol Number columns combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. byrow Whether arrange plots row combined plot. Default TRUE.

title: Proportion Test Plot — ProportionTestPlot
code: data(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- RunProportionTest(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "CellType",   split.by = "Phase" ) #> ℹ [2026-04-03 09:39:43] Start proportion test #> ℹ [2026-04-03 09:39:43] Running comparison: "G1" vs "S" #> ℹ [2026-04-03 09:39:50] Running comparison: "S" vs "G1" #> ℹ [2026-04-03 09:39:57] Running comparison: "G1" vs "G2M" #> ℹ [2026-04-03 09:40:04] Running comparison: "G2M" vs "G1" #> ℹ [2026-04-03 09:40:11] Running comparison: "S" vs "G1" #> ℹ [2026-04-03 09:40:18] Running comparison: "G1" vs "S" #> ℹ [2026-04-03 09:40:25] Running comparison: "S" vs "G2M" #> ℹ [2026-04-03 09:40:32] Running comparison: "G2M" vs "S" #> ℹ [2026-04-03 09:40:38] Running comparison: "G2M" vs "G1" #> ℹ [2026-04-03 09:40:45] Running comparison: "G1" vs "G2M" #> ℹ [2026-04-03 09:40:52] Running comparison: "G2M" vs "S" #> ℹ [2026-04-03 09:40:59] Running comparison: "S" vs "G2M" #> ✔ [2026-04-03 09:41:05] Proportion test completed  ProportionTestPlot(pancreas_sub) #> Warning: Removed 1 row containing missing values or values outside the scale range #> (`geom_segment()`). #> Warning: Removed 1 row containing missing values or values outside the scale range #> (`geom_segment()`). #> Warning: Removed 2 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range #> (`geom_segment()`). #> Warning: Removed 2 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range #> (`geom_segment()`). #> Warning: Removed 1 row containing missing values or values outside the scale range #> (`geom_segment()`). #> Warning: Removed 1 row containing missing values or values outside the scale range #> (`geom_segment()`).   # Plot specific comparisons ProportionTestPlot(   pancreas_sub,   comparison = c("G2M_vs_G1", "G2M_vs_S") ) #> Warning: Removed 2 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range #> (`geom_segment()`). #> Warning: Removed 1 row containing missing values or values outside the scale range #> (`geom_segment()`).   # Plot paired comparisons using list format ProportionTestPlot(   pancreas_sub,   comparison = list(c("G2M", "G1")) ) #> Warning: Removed 2 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range #> (`geom_segment()`). #> Warning: Removed 2 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range #> (`geom_segment()`). title: Seurat v5 RPCA integration — RPCA_integrate
text: Seurat v5 RPCA integration

title: Seurat v5 RPCA integration — RPCA_integrate
code: RPCA_integrate(   srt_merge = NULL,   batch = NULL,   append = TRUE,   srt_list = NULL,   assay = NULL,   do_normalization = NULL,   normalization_method = "LogNormalize",   do_HVF_finding = TRUE,   HVF_source = "separate",   HVF_method = "vst",   nHVF = 2000,   HVF_min_intersection = 1,   HVF = NULL,   do_scaling = TRUE,   vars_to_regress = NULL,   regression_model = "linear",   linear_reduction = "pca",   linear_reduction_dims = 50,   linear_reduction_dims_use = NULL,   linear_reduction_params = list(),   force_linear_reduction = FALSE,   nonlinear_reduction = "umap",   nonlinear_reduction_dims = c(2, 3),   nonlinear_reduction_params = list(),   force_nonlinear_reduction = TRUE,   neighbor_metric = "euclidean",   neighbor_k = 20L,   cluster_algorithm = "louvain",   cluster_resolution = 0.6,   IntegrateLayers_params = list(),   verbose = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: Seurat v5 RPCA integration — RPCA_integrate
text: srt_merge merged `Seurat` object includes batch information. batch character string specifying batch variable name. append Whether integrated data appended original Seurat object (srt_merge). Default TRUE. srt_list list Seurat objects checked preprocessed. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. do_normalization Whether data normalization performed. Default TRUE. normalization_method normalization method used. Possible values "LogNormalize", "SCT", "TFIDF". Default "LogNormalize". do_HVF_finding Whether perform high variable feature finding. TRUE, function force find highly variable features (HVF) using specified HVF method. HVF_source source highly variable features. Possible values "global" "separate". Default "separate". HVF_method method use finding highly variable features. Options "vst", "mvp", "disp". Default "vst". nHVF number highly variable features select. NULL, highly variable features used. Default 2000. HVF_min_intersection feature needs present batches minimum number times order considered highly variable. Default 1. HVF vector feature names use highly variable features. NULL, function use highly variable features identified HVF method. do_scaling Whether perform scaling. TRUE, function force scale data using Seurat::ScaleData function. vars_to_regress vector variable names include additional regression variables. Default NULL. regression_model regression model use scaling. Options "linear", "poisson", "negativebinomial". Default "linear". linear_reduction linear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "pca", "svd", "ica", "nmf", "mds", "glmpca". Default "pca". linear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep linear dimensionality reduction. Default 50. linear_reduction_dims_use dimensions use downstream analysis. NULL, estimated dimensions stored linear reduction used available; otherwise, first 50 dimensions used fallback. linear_reduction_params list parameters pass linear dimensionality reduction method. force_linear_reduction Whether force linear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". nonlinear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep nonlinear dimensionality reduction. vector provided, different numbers dimensions can specified method. Default c(2, 3). nonlinear_reduction_params list parameters pass nonlinear dimensionality reduction method. force_nonlinear_reduction Whether force nonlinear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. Default TRUE. neighbor_metric distance metric use finding neighbors. Options "euclidean", "cosine", "manhattan", "hamming". Default "euclidean". neighbor_k number nearest neighbors use finding neighbors. Default 20. cluster_algorithm clustering algorithm use. Options "louvain", "slm", "leiden". Default "louvain". cluster_resolution resolution parameter use clustering. Larger values result fewer clusters. Default 0.6. IntegrateLayers_params list parameters passed [Seurat::IntegrateLayers]. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

what: Attempt to recover raw counts from the normalized matrix — RecoverCounts
title: Attempt to recover raw counts from the normalized matrix — RecoverCounts
text: Attempt recover raw counts normalized matrix

title: Attempt to recover raw counts from the normalized matrix — RecoverCounts
code: RecoverCounts(   srt,   assay = NULL,   trans = c("expm1", "exp", "none"),   min_count = c(1, 2, 3),   tolerance = 0.1,   sf = NULL,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Attempt to recover raw counts from the normalized matrix — RecoverCounts
text: srt Seurat object. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. trans transformation function applied data presumed log-normalized. min_count Minimum UMI count genes. tolerance recovering raw counts, nCount cell theoretically calculated integer. However, due decimal point preservation normalization, calculated nCount usually floating point number close integer. tolerance difference integer. Default 0.1 sf Set scaling factor manually. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

what: Single-cell reference mapping with CSS method — RunCSSMap
title: Single-cell reference mapping with CSS method — RunCSSMap
text: Single-cell reference mapping CSS method

title: Single-cell reference mapping with CSS method — RunCSSMap
code: RunCSSMap(   srt_query,   srt_ref,   query_assay = NULL,   ref_assay = srt_ref[[ref_css]]@assay.used,   ref_css = NULL,   ref_umap = NULL,   ref_group = NULL,   projection_method = c("model", "knn"),   nn_method = NULL,   k = 30,   distance_metric = "cosine",   vote_fun = "mean" )

title: Single-cell reference mapping with CSS method — RunCSSMap
text: srt_query object class Seurat annotated cell types. srt_ref Seurat object count matrix representing reference object. provided, similarities calculated cells query reference objects. provided, similarities calculated within query object. query_assay assay use query object. provided, default assay query object used. ref_assay assay use reference object. provided, default assay reference object used. ref_css name CSS reduction reference object use calculating distance metric. ref_umap character string specifying name UMAP reduction reference object. provided, first UMAP reduction found reference object used. ref_group grouping variable reference object. variable used group cells heatmap columns. provided, cells treated one group. projection_method character string specifying projection method use. Options "model" "knn". "model" selected, function try use pre-trained UMAP model reference object projection. "knn" selected, function directly find nearest neighbors using distance metric. nn_method character string specifying nearest neighbor search method use. Options "raw", "annoy", "rann". "raw" selected, function use brute-force method find nearest neighbors. "annoy" selected, function use Annoy library approximate nearest neighbor search. "rann" selected, function use RANN library approximate nearest neighbor search. provided, function choose search method based size query reference datasets. k number nearest neighbors find cell query object. distance_metric distance metric use calculating pairwise distances cells. Options include: "pearson", "spearman", "cosine", "correlation", "jaccard", "ejaccard", "dice", "edice", "hamman", "simple matching", "faith". Additional distance metrics can also used, "euclidean", "manhattan", "hamming", etc. vote_fun character string specifying function used aggregating nearest neighbors reference object. Options "mean", "median", "sum", "min", "max", "sd", "var", etc. provided, default "mean".

title: Single-cell reference mapping with CSS method — RunCSSMap
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ data(panc8_sub) panc8_sub <- standard_scop(panc8_sub) srt_ref <- panc8_sub[, panc8_sub$tech != "fluidigmc1"] srt_query <- panc8_sub[, panc8_sub$tech == "fluidigmc1"] srt_ref <- integration_scop(   srt_ref,   batch = "tech",   integration_method = "CSS" ) CellDimPlot(srt_ref, group.by = c("celltype", "tech"))  # Projection srt_query <- RunCSSMap(   srt_query = srt_query,   srt_ref = srt_ref,   ref_css = "CSS",   ref_umap = "CSSUMAP2D" ) ProjectionPlot(   srt_query = srt_query,   srt_ref = srt_ref,   query_group = "celltype",   ref_group = "celltype" ) } # }

title: Run cell-level quality control for single cell RNA-seq data. — RunCellQC
code: RunCellQC(   srt,   assay = "RNA",   split.by = NULL,   group.by = NULL,   return_filtered = FALSE,   qc_metrics = c("doublets", "decontX", "outlier", "umi", "gene", "mito", "ribo",     "ribo_mito_ratio", "species"),   db_method = "scDblFinder",   db_rate = NULL,   db_coefficient = 0.01,   decontX_threshold = NULL,   decontX_batch = NULL,   decontX_background = NULL,   decontX_background_assay = NULL,   decontX_bg_batch = NULL,   decontX_assay_name = "decontXcounts",   decontX_store_assay = FALSE,   decontX_round_counts = TRUE,   decontX_args = list(),   outlier_threshold = c("log10_nCount:lower:2.5", "log10_nCount:higher:5",     "log10_nFeature:lower:2.5", "log10_nFeature:higher:5", "featurecount_dist:lower:2.5"),   outlier_n = 1,   UMI_threshold = 3000,   gene_threshold = 1000,   mito_threshold = 20,   mito_pattern = c("MT-", "Mt-", "mt-"),   mito_gene = NULL,   ribo_threshold = 50,   ribo_pattern = c("RP[SL]\\d+\\w{0,1}\\d*$", "Rp[sl]\\d+\\w{0,1}\\d*$",     "rp[sl]\\d+\\w{0,1}\\d*$"),   ribo_gene = NULL,   ribo_mito_ratio_range = c(1, Inf),   species = NULL,   species_gene_prefix = NULL,   species_percent = 95,   seed = 11 )

title: Run cell-level quality control for single cell RNA-seq data. — RunCellQC
text: srt Seurat object. assay name assay used doublet-calling. Default "RNA". split.Name column meta.data column split plot . Default NULL. group.Group labels passed RunDecontX() "decontX" included qc_metrics. Can NULL, meta.data column name, vector aligned cells. Default NULL. return_filtered Logical indicating whether return cell-filtered Seurat object. Default FALSE. qc_metrics character vector specifying quality control metrics applied. Available metrics "doublets", "decontX", "outlier", "umi", "gene", "mito", "ribo", "ribo_mito_ratio", "species". Default c("doublets", "decontX", "outlier", "umi", "gene", "mito", "ribo", "ribo_mito_ratio", "species"). db_method Method used doublet-calling. Can one "scDblFinder", "Scrublet", "DoubletDetection", "scds_cxds", "scds_bcds", "scds_hybrid". db_rate expected doublet rate. Default calculated ncol(srt) / 1000 * 0.01. db_coefficient coefficient used calculate doublet rate. Default 0.01. Doublet rate calculated ncol(srt) / 1000 * db_coefficient. decontX_threshold Optional contamination threshold used filter cells running RunDecontX(). Cells decontX_contamination greater value marked failed decontX_qc. Default NULL, computes decontX results without filtering cells contamination. decontX_batch Batch labels passed RunDecontX() "decontX" included qc_metrics. Default NULL. decontX_background Optional background / empty-droplet input passed RunDecontX() "decontX" included qc_metrics. Default NULL. decontX_background_assay Assay name used decontX_background Seurat object SingleCellExperiment. Default NULL. decontX_bg_batch Batch labels decontX_background passed RunDecontX(). Default NULL. decontX_assay_name Name assay used store decontaminated counts RunDecontX(). Default "decontXcounts". decontX_store_assay Whether store decontaminated counts new assay running RunDecontX(). Default FALSE. decontX_round_counts Whether round decontaminated counts creating assay RunDecontX(). Default TRUE. decontX_args named list additional advanced arguments passed RunDecontX() "decontX" included qc_metrics. Explicit decontX_* parameters preferred common options take precedence supplied. Default list(). outlier_threshold character vector specifying outlier threshold. Default c("log10_nCount:lower:2.5", "log10_nCount:higher:5", "log10_nFeature:lower:2.5", "log10_nFeature:higher:5", "featurecount_dist:lower:2.5"). outlier_n Minimum number outlier metrics meet conditions determining outlier cells. Default 1. UMI_threshold UMI number threshold. Cells exceed threshold considered kept. Default 3000. gene_threshold Gene number threshold. Cells exceed threshold considered kept. Default 1000. mito_threshold Percentage UMI counts mitochondrial genes. Cells exceed threshold considered discarded. Default 20. mito_pattern Regex patterns match mitochondrial genes. Default c("MT-", "Mt-", "mt-"). mito_gene defined mitochondrial genes. features provided, ignore mito_pattern matching. Default NULL. ribo_threshold Percentage UMI counts ribosomal genes. Cells exceed threshold considered discarded. Default 50. ribo_pattern Regex patterns match ribosomal genes. Default c("RP[SL]\\d+\\w{0,1}\\d*$", "Rp[sl]\\d+\\w{0,1}\\d*$", "rp[sl]\\d+\\w{0,1}\\d*$"). ribo_gene defined ribosomal genes. features provided, ignore ribo_pattern matching. Default NULL. ribo_mito_ratio_range numeric vector specifying range ribosomal/mitochondrial gene expression ratios ribo_mito_ratio outlier cells. Default c(1, Inf). species Species used suffix QC metrics. first species interest. Default NULL. species_gene_prefix Species gene prefix used calculate QC metrics species. Default NULL. species_percent Percentage UMI counts first species. Cells exceed threshold considered kept. Default 95. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

text: CellRank toolkit studying cellular dynamics using Markov state modeling.

title: Run CellRank analysis — RunCellRank
code: RunCellRank(   srt = NULL,   assay_x = "RNA",   layer_x = "counts",   assay_y = c("spliced", "unspliced"),   layer_y = "counts",   adata = NULL,   group.by = NULL,   cores = 1,   linear_reduction = NULL,   nonlinear_reduction = NULL,   basis = NULL,   mode = "stochastic",   fitting_by = "stochastic",   magic_impute = FALSE,   knn = 5,   t = 2,   min_shared_counts = 30,   n_pcs = 30,   n_neighbors = 30,   stream_smooth = NULL,   stream_density = 2,   arrow_size = 5,   arrow_length = 5,   arrow_density = 0.5,   calculate_velocity_genes = FALSE,   denoise = FALSE,   kinetics = FALSE,   kernel_type = c("velocity", "pseudotime", "cytotrace"),   time_key = "dpt_pseudotime",   estimator_type = c("GPCCA", "CFLARE"),   use_connectivity_kernel = TRUE,   velocity_weight = 0.8,   connectivity_weight = 0.2,   softmax_scale = 4,   n_macrostates = NULL,   schur_method = c("krylov", "brandts"),   n_cells_terminal = 10,   show_plot = TRUE,   save_plot = FALSE,   plot_format = c("pdf", "png", "svg"),   plot_dpi = 300,   plot_prefix = "cellrank",   legend.position = "on data",   palette = "Chinese",   palcolor = NULL,   dirpath = "./cellrank",   return_seurat = !is.null(srt),   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run CellRank analysis — RunCellRank
text: srt Seurat object. Default NULL. provided, adata ignored. assay_x Assay convert main data matrix anndata object. Default "RNA". layer_x Layer name assay_x Seurat object. Default "counts". assay_y Assays convert layers anndata object. Default c("spliced", "unspliced"). layer_y Layer names assay_y Seurat object. Default "counts". adata anndata object. Default NULL. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . cores number cores use cellrank. linear_reduction linear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "pca", "svd", "ica", "nmf", "mds", "glmpca". Default "pca". nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". basis basis use reduction, e.g., "UMAP". mode Velocity estimation models use. Can "deterministic", "stochastic", "dynamical". fitting_by Method used fit gene velocities dynamical modeling. Default "stochastic". magic_impute Flag indicating whether perform magic imputation. Default FALSE. knn number nearest neighbors magic.MAGIC. Default 5. t Power diffusion operator powered magic.MAGIC. Default 2. min_shared_counts Minimum number counts (unspliced spliced) required gene. Default 30. n_pcs Number principal components use linear reduction. Default 30. n_neighbors Number neighbors use constructing KNN graph. Default 30. stream_smooth Multiplication factor scale Gaussian kernel around grid point. stream_density Controls closeness streamlines. density = 2 (default), domain divided 60x60 grid, whereas density linearly scales grid. cell grid can , , one traversing streamline. Default 2. arrow_size Size arrows. Default 5. arrow_length Length arrows. arrow_density Amount velocities show. calculate_velocity_genes Boolean flag indicating whether calculate velocity genes. denoise Boolean flag indicating whether denoise. kinetics Boolean flag indicating whether estimate RNA kinetics. kernel_type Type kernel use: "velocity" (default, requires spliced/unspliced), "pseudotime" (requires pre-computed pseudotime auto-computes DPT), "cytotrace" (auto-computes CytoTRACE score, suitable RNA-data). time_key Key metadata pseudotime. Used kernel_type = "pseudotime". key exist, DPT pseudotime computed automatically. Default "dpt_pseudotime". estimator_type Type estimator use: "GPCCA" (default) "CFLARE". GPCCA provides coarse-grained analysis Schur decomposition. use_connectivity_kernel Whether combine main kernel ConnectivityKernel. Default TRUE. velocity_weight Weight VelocityKernel combining ConnectivityKernel. Default 0.8. connectivity_weight Weight ConnectivityKernel combining VelocityKernel. Default 0.2. Weights automatically normalized sum 1.0. softmax_scale Scaling parameter softmax transformation velocity kernel. Default 4. n_macrostates Number macrostates compute. NULL (default), automatically determined based eigenvalue spectrum. schur_method Method Schur decomposition: "krylov" "brandts". used GPCCA estimator. n_cells_terminal Minimum number cells required state considered terminal. Default 10. show_plot Whether show plot. Default FALSE. save_plot Whether save plots files. Default FALSE. plot_format Format saved plots: "png" (default), "pdf", "svg". plot_dpi Resolution (DPI) saved plots. Default 300. plot_prefix Prefix saved plot filenames. Default "cellrank". legend.position Position legend plots. Can "data", "right margin", "bottom right", etc. Default "data". palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "Chinese". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. dirpath directory save plots. Default "./cellrank". return_seurat Whether return Seurat object instead anndata object. Default TRUE. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run CellRank analysis — RunCellRank
text: Returns Seurat object return_seurat = TRUE anndata object CellRank results stored obsm, obs, varm slots. estimator kernel objects stored srt@misc$cellrank.

title: Run CellRank analysis — RunCellRank
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ data(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- RunCellRank(   srt = pancreas_sub,   group.by = "SubCellType" )  CellDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "term_states_fwd",   reduction = "umap",   label = TRUE )  FeatureDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   features = "latent_time",   reduction = "umap" )  FeatureDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   features = c("stochastic_confidence", "stochastic_length"),   reduction = "umap" )  CellDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "SubCellType",   reduction = "UMAP",   lineages = "cellrank_pseudotime",   lineages_span = 0.1,   lineages_trim = c(0.05, 0.95) )  DynamicPlot(   pancreas_sub,   lineages = "cellrank_pseudotime",   features = c("Arxes1", "Ncoa2"),   group.by = "SubCellType" ) } # }

what: Run CellTypist cell type annotation — RunCellTypist
title: Run CellTypist cell type annotation — RunCellTypist
text: CellTypist automated cell type annotation tool scRNA-seq datasets based logistic regression classifiers. function runs CellTypist annotation Seurat object AnnData object.

title: Run CellTypist cell type annotation — RunCellTypist
code: RunCellTypist(   srt = NULL,   adata = NULL,   assay = "RNA",   layer = "data",   model = "Immune_All_Low.pkl",   mode = "best match",   p_thres = 0.5,   majority_voting = FALSE,   over_clustering = NULL,   min_prop = 0,   use_GPU = FALSE,   insert_labels = TRUE,   insert_conf = TRUE,   insert_conf_by = "predicted_labels",   insert_prob = FALSE,   insert_decision = FALSE,   prefix = "celltypist_",   return_seurat = !is.null(srt),   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run CellTypist cell type annotation — RunCellTypist
text: srt Seurat object. Default NULL. provided, adata ignored. adata anndata object. Default NULL. assay assay use. Default "RNA". layer layer use. Default data. model Model name path. Default "Immune_All_Low.pkl". Supports three formats: Model name (e.g., "Immune_All_Low.pkl"): automatically searched ~/.celltypist/data/models/ Full path (contains /): use provided path directly NULL: use default model mode Prediction mode: "best match" "prob match". Default "best match". p_thres Probability threshold "prob match" mode. Default 0.5. majority_voting Whether use majority voting. Default FALSE. over_clustering -clustering result. Can : String: column name Seurat metadata AnnData obs Vector: -clustering labels NULL: use heuristic -clustering min_prop Minimum proportion majority voting. Default 0. use_GPU Whether use GPU -clustering. Default FALSE. insert_labels Whether insert predicted labels. Default TRUE. insert_conf Whether insert confidence scores. Default TRUE. insert_conf_by prediction type base confidence . Default "predicted_labels". insert_prob Whether insert probability matrix. Default FALSE. insert_decision Whether insert decision matrix. Default FALSE. prefix Prefix inserted columns. Default "celltypist_". return_seurat Whether return Seurat object instead anndata object. Default TRUE. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run CellTypist cell type annotation — RunCellTypist
text: AnnData object Seurat object depending return_seurat argument.

title: Run CellTypist cell type annotation — RunCellTypist
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ data(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- RunCellTypist(   pancreas_sub,   model = "Developing_Mouse_Brain.pkl" ) CellDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "celltypist_predicted_labels",   legend.position = "none" )  # Use prob match mode pancreas_sub <- RunCellTypist(   pancreas_sub,   model = "Developing_Mouse_Brain.pkl",   mode = "prob match",   p_thres = 0.5 )  # Use majority voting pancreas_sub <- RunCellTypist(   pancreas_sub,   model = "Developing_Mouse_Brain.pkl",   majority_voting = TRUE ) } # }

title: Run CellphoneDB analysis — RunCellphoneDB
code: RunCellphoneDB(   srt,   group.by,   species = c("Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus"),   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   counts_data = c("hgnc_symbol", "ensembl", "gene_name"),   method = c("statistical_analysis", "analysis", "degs_analysis"),   cpdb_file_path = NULL,   convert_to_human = TRUE,   gene_id_from_IDtype = "symbol",   microenvs = NULL,   active_tfs = NULL,   degs = NULL,   score_interactions = TRUE,   threshold = 0.1,   pvalue = 0.05,   iterations = 1000,   cores = 1,   separator = "|",   debug = FALSE,   debug_seed = 42,   result_precision = 3,   subsampling = FALSE,   subsampling_log = FALSE,   subsampling_num_pc = 100,   subsampling_num_cells = 1000,   output_path = NULL,   output_suffix = NULL,   keep_output = FALSE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run CellphoneDB analysis — RunCellphoneDB
text: srt Seurat object. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . species Species input data. CellphoneDB human-centric; non-human species supplied convert_to_human = TRUE, gene symbols converted human ortholog symbols running analysis. assay Assay use. layer Layer use CellphoneDB input. Default "data" CellphoneDB generally expects normalized expression. counts_data Gene identifier type used CellphoneDB. One "hgnc_symbol", "ensembl", "gene_name". method CellphoneDB analysis mode. One "statistical_analysis", "analysis", "degs_analysis". cpdb_file_path Path cellphonedb.zip. NULL, wrapper try common locations download automatically found. convert_to_human Whether convert non-human gene symbols human ortholog symbols running CellphoneDB. gene_id_from_IDtype Input gene identifier type passed GeneConvert convert_to_human = TRUE. microenvs Optional CellphoneDB microenvironment specification. Can data.frame file path. active_tfs Optional CellphoneDB active TF specification. Can data.frame file path. degs Optional DEG table method = "degs_analysis". Can data.frame file path. score_interactions Whether compute CellphoneDB interaction scores. threshold Minimum fraction cells expressing gene gene considered. pvalue P-value threshold used CellphoneDB. iterations Number permutations statistical analysis. cores Number cores used CellphoneDB. separator Separator used CellphoneDB sender/receiver pair columns. debug Whether ask CellphoneDB save intermediate debug tables. debug_seed Random seed used CellphoneDB. result_precision Result precision used CellphoneDB. subsampling Whether enable CellphoneDB subsampling. subsampling_log Whether log-transform CellphoneDB subsampling. subsampling_num_pc Number PCs used CellphoneDB subsampling. subsampling_num_cells Number cells retained CellphoneDB subsampling. output_path Optional directory keep CellphoneDB output files. output_suffix Optional output suffix passed CellphoneDB. keep_output Whether keep temporary output files output_path supplied. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run CellphoneDB analysis — RunCellphoneDB
text: Seurat object results stored srt@tools[["CellphoneDB"]].

title: Run CytoTRACE 2 — RunCytoTRACE
text: Run CytoTRACE 2

title: Run CytoTRACE 2 — RunCytoTRACE
code: RunCytoTRACE(object, ...)  # S3 method for class 'Seurat' RunCytoTRACE(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = c("counts", "data"),   species = c("Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus"),   batch_size = 10000,   smooth_batch_size = 1000,   parallelize_models = TRUE,   parallelize_smoothing = TRUE,   cores = 1,   seed = 11,   verbose = TRUE,   ... )  # Default S3 method RunCytoTRACE(   object,   species = c("Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus"),   batch_size = 10000,   smooth_batch_size = 1000,   parallelize_models = TRUE,   parallelize_smoothing = TRUE,   cores = 1,   seed = 11,   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: Run CytoTRACE 2 — RunCytoTRACE
text: object object. can Seurat object matrix-like object (genes rows, cells columns). ... Additional arguments passed CytoTRACE2::cytotrace2. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. layer layer use. Default "counts". species species input data. Currently supported values "human" "mouse". Default "human". batch_size number cells process , including subsampling KNN smoothing. subsampling NULL. Default 10000 (recommended input data size > 10K cells). smooth_batch_size number cells subsample within batch_size smoothing diffusion step pipeline. subsampling NULL. Default 1000 (recommended input data size > 1K cells). parallelize_models Whether run prediction function models parallel multiple threads. Default TRUE. parallelize_smoothing Whether run smoothing function subsamples parallel multiple threads. Default TRUE. cores number cores use parallelization foreach::foreach. Default 1. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run CytoTRACE 2 — RunCytoTRACE
text: input Seurat object, function returns Seurat object following metadata columns added: CytoTRACE2_Score: final predicted cellular potency score (0-1) CytoTRACE2_Potency: final predicted cellular potency category (Differentiated, Unipotent, Oligopotent, Multipotent, Pluripotent, Totipotent) CytoTRACE2_Relative: predicted relative order (normalized 0-1) preKNN_CytoTRACE2_Score: potency score KNN smoothing preKNN_CytoTRACE2_Potency: potency category KNN smoothing input matrix data.frame, function returns data.frame columns , cell IDs row names.

title: Differential gene test — RunDEtest
text: function utilizes Seurat package perform differential expression (DE) test gene expression data. Users flexibility specify custom cell groups, marker types, various options DE analysis.

title: Differential gene test — RunDEtest
code: RunDEtest(   srt,   group.by = NULL,   group1 = NULL,   group2 = NULL,   cells1 = NULL,   cells2 = NULL,   features = NULL,   markers_type = c("all", "paired", "conserved", "disturbed"),   grouping.var = NULL,   meta.method = c("maximump", "minimump", "wilkinsonp", "meanp", "sump", "votep"),   test.use = "wilcox",   only.pos = TRUE,   fc.threshold = 1.5,   base = 2,   pseudocount.use = 1,   mean.fxn = NULL,   min.pct = 0.1,   min.diff.pct = -Inf,   max.cells.per.ident = Inf,   latent.vars = NULL,   min.cells.feature = 3,   min.cells.group = 3,   norm.method = "LogNormalize",   p.adjust.method = "bonferroni",   layer = "data",   assay = NULL,   seed = 11,   verbose = TRUE,   cores = 1,   ... )

title: Differential gene test — RunDEtest
text: srt Seurat object. group.grouping variable dataset define groups conditions differential test. provided, function uses "active.ident" variable Seurat object. group1 vector cell IDs character vector specifying cells belong first group. group.group1 provided, group1 takes precedence. group2 vector cell IDs character vector specifying cells belong second group. parameter used group.group1 provided. cells1 vector cell IDs specifying cells belong group1. provided, group1 ignored. cells2 vector cell IDs specifying cells belong group2. parameter used cells1 provided. features vector gene names specifying features consider differential test. provided, features dataset considered. markers_type character value specifying type markers find. Possible values "", "paired", "conserved", "disturbed". grouping.var character value specifying grouping variable finding conserved disturbed markers. parameter used markers_type "conserved" "disturbed". meta.method character value specifying method use combining p-values conserved markers test. Possible values "maximump", "minimump", "wilkinsonp", "meanp", "sump", "votep". test.use Denotes test use. Available options : "wilcox" : Identifies differentially expressed genes two  groups cells using Wilcoxon Rank Sum test (default); use fast  implementation Presto installed "wilcox_limma" : Identifies differentially expressed genes two  groups cells using limma implementation Wilcoxon Rank Sum test;  set option reproduce results Seurat v4 "bimod" : Likelihood-ratio test single cell gene expression,  (McDavid et al., Bioinformatics, 2013) "roc" : Identifies 'markers' gene expression using ROC analysis.  gene, evaluates (using AUC) classifier built gene alone,  classify two groups cells. AUC value 1 means  expression values gene alone can perfectly classify two  groupings (.e. cells cells.1 exhibit higher level  cells cells.2). AUC value 0 also means perfect  classification, direction. value 0.5 implies  gene predictive power classify two groups. Returns  'predictive power' (abs(AUC-0.5) * 2) ranked matrix putative differentially  expressed genes. "t" : Identify differentially expressed genes two groups  cells using Student's t-test. "negbinom" : Identifies differentially expressed genes two   groups cells using negative binomial generalized linear model.   Use UMI-based datasets "poisson" : Identifies differentially expressed genes two   groups cells using poisson generalized linear model.   Use UMI-based datasets "LR" : Uses logistic regression framework determine differentially  expressed genes. Constructs logistic regression model predicting group  membership based feature individually compares null  model likelihood ratio test. "MAST" : Identifies differentially expressed genes two groups  cells using hurdle model tailored scRNA-seq data. Utilizes MAST  package run DE testing. "DESeq2" : Identifies differentially expressed genes two groups  cells based model using DESeq2 uses negative binomial  distribution (Love et al, Genome Biology, 2014).test support  pre-filtering genes based average difference (percent detection rate)  cell groups. However, genes may pre-filtered based  minimum detection rate (min.pct) across cell groups. use method,  please install DESeq2, using instructions  https://bioconductor.org/packages/release/bioc/html/DESeq2.html .pos return positive markers (FALSE default) fc.threshold numeric value used filter genes testing based average fold change /among two groups. Default 1.5. base base respect logarithms computed. pseudocount.use Pseudocount add averaged expression values calculating logFC. 1 default. mean.fxn Function use fold change average difference calculation. default depends value fc.slot: "counts" : difference log mean counts, pseudocount. "data" : difference log average exponentiated data, pseudocount.  adjusts differences sequencing depth cells, assumes "data"  log-normalized. "scale.data" : difference means scale.data. min.pct test genes detected minimum fraction min.pct cells either two populations. Meant speed function testing genes infrequently expressed. Default 0.01 min.diff.pct test genes show minimum difference fraction detection two groups. Set -Inf default max.cells.per.ident sample identity class max number. Default downsampling. activated default (set Inf) latent.vars Variables test, used test.use one 'LR', 'negbinom', 'poisson', 'MAST' min.cells.feature Minimum number cells expressing feature least one two groups, currently used poisson negative binomial tests min.cells.group Minimum number cells one groups norm.method Normalization method fold change calculation layer 'data'. Default "LogNormalize". p.adjust.method character value specifying method use adjusting p-values. Default "bonferroni". layer layer use. Default data. assay Assay use differential expression testing seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. cores number cores use parallelization foreach::foreach. Default 1. ... Additional arguments pass Seurat::FindMarkers function.

title: Run diffusion map (DM) — RunDM
code: RunDM(object, ...)  # S3 method for class 'Seurat' RunDM(   object,   reduction = "pca",   dims = 1:30,   features = NULL,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   ndcs = 2,   sigma = "local",   k = 30,   dist.method = "euclidean",   npcs = NULL,   reduction.name = "dm",   reduction.key = "DM_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )  # Default S3 method RunDM(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   ndcs = 2,   sigma = "local",   k = 30,   dist.method = "euclidean",   npcs = NULL,   reduction.key = "DM_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )

title: Run diffusion map (DM) — RunDM
text: object object. can Seurat object matrix-like object. ... Additional arguments passed destiny::DiffusionMap. reduction dimensionality reduction use. Default "pca". dims dimensions used. Default NULL. features character vector features use. Default NULL. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. layer layer use. Default data. ndcs number diffusion components (dimensions) computed. Default 2. sigma diffusion scale parameter Gaussian kernel. Currently supported values "local" (default) "global". k number nearest neighbors used construction graph. Default 30. dist.method distance metric used construction knn graph. Currently supported values "euclidean" "cosine". Default "euclidean". npcs Number principal components use dimensionality reduction computing diffusion map. can speed computation using many features. Default NULL (auto-determined based number features). reduction.name name reduction stored Seurat object. Default "dm". reduction.key prefix column names basis vectors. Default "DM_". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed.use Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: RunDynamicEnrichment — RunDynamicEnrichment
text: function calculates gene-set scores specified database (db) lineage using specified scoring method (score_method). treats scores expression values uses input RunDynamicFeatures function identify dynamically enriched terms along lineage.

title: RunDynamicEnrichment — RunDynamicEnrichment
code: RunDynamicEnrichment(   srt,   lineages,   score_method = "AUCell",   layer = "data",   assay = NULL,   min_expcells = 20,   r.sq = 0.2,   dev.expl = 0.2,   padjust = 0.05,   IDtype = "symbol",   species = "Homo_sapiens",   db = "GO_BP",   db_update = FALSE,   db_version = "latest",   convert_species = TRUE,   Ensembl_version = NULL,   mirror = NULL,   TERM2GENE = NULL,   TERM2NAME = NULL,   minGSSize = 10,   maxGSSize = 500,   cores = 1,   verbose = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: RunDynamicEnrichment — RunDynamicEnrichment
text: srt Seurat object containing results differential expression analysis (RunDEtest). specified, genes groups extracted Seurat object automatically. specified, geneID geneID_groups arguments must provided. lineages character vector specifying lineage names dynamic features calculated. score_method method use scoring. Can "Seurat", "AUCell", "UCell". Default "Seurat". layer layer use. Default "counts". assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. min_expcells minimum number expected cells. Default 20. r.sq R-squared threshold. Default 0.2. dev.expl deviance explained threshold. Default 0.2. padjust p-value adjustment threshold. Default 0.05. IDtype character vector specifying type gene IDs srt object geneID argument. argument used convert gene IDs different type IDtype different result_IDtype. species character vector specifying species gene annotation databases prepared. Can "Homo_sapiens" "Mus_musculus". db character vector specifying annotation sources included gene annotation databases. Can one "GO", "GO_BP", "GO_CC", "GO_MF", "KEGG", "WikiPathway", "Reactome", "CORUM", "MP", "", "HPO", "PFAM", "CSPA", "Surfaceome", "SPRomeDB", "VerSeDa", "TFLink", "hTFtarget", "TRRUST", "JASPAR", "ENCODE", "MSigDB", "CellTalk", "CellChat", "Chromosome", "GeneType", "Enzyme", "TF". db_update Whether gene annotation databases forcefully updated. set FALSE, function attempt load cached databases instead. Default FALSE. db_version character vector specifying version gene annotation databases retrieved. Default "latest". convert_species Whether use species-converted database annotation missing specified species. Default TRUE. Ensembl_version integer specifying Ensembl version. Default NULL. NULL, latest version used. mirror Specify Ensembl mirror connect . valid options "www", "uswest", "useast", "asia". TERM2GENE data frame specifying gene-term mapping custom database. first column contain term IDs, second column contain gene IDs. TERM2NAME data frame specifying term-name mapping custom database. first column contain term IDs, second column contain corresponding term names. minGSSize minimum size gene set considered enrichment analysis. maxGSSize maximum size gene set considered enrichment analysis. cores number cores use parallelization foreach::foreach. Default 1. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Calculates dynamic features for lineages — RunDynamicFeatures
text: Calculates dynamic features lineages

title: Calculates dynamic features for lineages — RunDynamicFeatures
code: RunDynamicFeatures(   srt,   lineages,   features = NULL,   suffix = lineages,   n_candidates = 1000,   minfreq = 5,   family = NULL,   layer = "counts",   assay = NULL,   libsize = NULL,   fit_method = c("gam", "pretsa"),   knot = 0,   max_knot_allowed = 10,   padjust_method = "fdr",   cores = 1,   verbose = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: Calculates dynamic features for lineages — RunDynamicFeatures
text: srt Seurat object. lineages character vector specifying lineage names dynamic features calculated. features character vector features use. NULL, n_candidates must provided. suffix character vector specifying suffix append output layer names lineage. Default lineage names. n_candidates number candidate features select features NULL. Default 1000. minfreq integer specifying minimum frequency threshold candidate features. Features frequency less minfreq excluded. Default 5. family character character vector specifying family distributions use GAM. family set NULL, appropriate family automatically determined based data. length(family) 1, family used features. Otherwise, family must length features. layer layer use. Default "counts". assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. libsize numeric numeric vector specifying library size correction factors cell. NULL, library size correction factors calculated based expression matrix. length(libsize) 1, value used cells. Otherwise, libsize must length number cells srt. Default NULL. fit_method method used fitting features. Either "gam" (generalized additive models) "pretsa" (Pattern recognition Temporal Spatial Analyses). Default "gam". knot fit_method = "pretsa": B-spline knots. 0 "auto". Default 0. max_knot_allowed fit_method = "pretsa" knot = "auto": max knots. Default 10. padjust_method method used p-value adjustment. Default "fdr". cores number cores use parallelization foreach::foreach. Default 1. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Calculates dynamic features for lineages — RunDynamicFeatures
text: Returns modified Seurat object calculated dynamic features stored tools slot.

what: Perform the enrichment analysis (over-representation) on the genes — RunEnrichment
title: Perform the enrichment analysis (over-representation) on the genes — RunEnrichment
text: Perform enrichment analysis (-representation) genes

title: Perform the enrichment analysis (over-representation) on the genes — RunEnrichment
code: RunEnrichment(   srt = NULL,   group.by = NULL,   test.use = "wilcox",   DE_threshold = "avg_log2FC > 0 & p_val_adj < 0.05",   geneID = NULL,   geneID_groups = NULL,   geneID_exclude = NULL,   IDtype = "symbol",   result_IDtype = "symbol",   species = "Homo_sapiens",   db = "GO_BP",   db_update = FALSE,   db_version = "latest",   db_combine = FALSE,   convert_species = TRUE,   Ensembl_version = NULL,   mirror = NULL,   TERM2GENE = NULL,   TERM2NAME = NULL,   minGSSize = 10,   maxGSSize = 500,   unlimited_db = c("Chromosome", "GeneType", "TF", "Enzyme", "CSPA"),   GO_simplify = FALSE,   GO_simplify_cutoff = "p.adjust < 0.05",   simplify_method = "Wang",   simplify_similarityCutoff = 0.7,   cores = 1,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Perform the enrichment analysis (over-representation) on the genes — RunEnrichment
text: srt Seurat object containing results differential expression analysis (RunDEtest). specified, genes groups extracted Seurat object automatically. specified, geneID geneID_groups arguments must provided. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . test.use character vector specifying test used differential expression analysis. argument used srt specified. DE_threshold character vector specifying filter condition differential expression analysis. argument used srt specified. geneID character vector specifying gene IDs. geneID_groups factor vector specifying group labels gene. geneID_exclude character vector specifying gene IDs excluded analysis. IDtype character vector specifying type gene IDs srt object geneID argument. argument used convert gene IDs different type IDtype different result_IDtype. result_IDtype character vector specifying desired type gene ID used output. argument used convert gene IDs IDtype result_IDtype. species character vector specifying species gene annotation databases prepared. Can "Homo_sapiens" "Mus_musculus". db character vector specifying annotation sources included gene annotation databases. Can one "GO", "GO_BP", "GO_CC", "GO_MF", "KEGG", "WikiPathway", "Reactome", "CORUM", "MP", "", "HPO", "PFAM", "CSPA", "Surfaceome", "SPRomeDB", "VerSeDa", "TFLink", "hTFtarget", "TRRUST", "JASPAR", "ENCODE", "MSigDB", "CellTalk", "CellChat", "Chromosome", "GeneType", "Enzyme", "TF". db_update Whether gene annotation databases forcefully updated. set FALSE, function attempt load cached databases instead. Default FALSE. db_version character vector specifying version gene annotation databases retrieved. Default "latest". db_combine Whether combine multiple databases one. TRUE, database specified db combined one named "Combined". convert_species Whether use species-converted database annotation missing specified species. Default TRUE. Ensembl_version integer specifying Ensembl version. Default NULL. NULL, latest version used. mirror Specify Ensembl mirror connect . valid options "www", "uswest", "useast", "asia". TERM2GENE data frame specifying gene-term mapping custom database. first column contain term IDs, second column contain gene IDs. TERM2NAME data frame specifying term-name mapping custom database. first column contain term IDs, second column contain corresponding term names. minGSSize minimum size gene set considered enrichment analysis. maxGSSize maximum size gene set considered enrichment analysis. unlimited_db character vector specifying names databases size restrictions. GO_simplify Whether simplify GO terms. TRUE, additional results simplified GO terms returned. GO_simplify_cutoff character vector specifying filter condition simplification GO terms. argument used GO_simplify TRUE. simplify_method character vector specifying method used simplification GO terms. argument used GO_simplify TRUE. simplify_similarityCutoff similarity cutoff simplification GO terms. argument used GO_simplify TRUE. cores number cores use parallelization foreach::foreach. Default 1. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Perform the enrichment analysis (over-representation) on the genes — RunEnrichment
text: input Seurat object, returns modified Seurat object enrichment result stored tools slot. input geneID vector without geneID_groups, return enrichment result directly. Enrichment result list following component: enrichment: data.frame containing enrichment results. results: list enrichResult objects DOSE package. geneMap: data.frame containing ID mapping table input gene IDs. input: data.frame containing input gene IDs gene ID groups. DE_threshold: specific threshold differential expression analysis (returned input Seurat object).

title: Run Force-Directed Layout (Fruchterman-Reingold algorithm) — RunFR
text: Run Force-Directed Layout (Fruchterman-Reingold algorithm)

title: Run Force-Directed Layout (Fruchterman-Reingold algorithm) — RunFR
code: RunFR(object, ...)  # S3 method for class 'Seurat' RunFR(   object,   reduction = NULL,   dims = NULL,   features = NULL,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   graph = NULL,   neighbor = NULL,   k.param = 20,   ndim = 2,   niter = 500,   reduction.name = "FR",   reduction.key = "FR_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11L,   ... )  # Default S3 method RunFR(   object,   assay = NULL,   ndim = 2,   niter = 500,   reduction.key = "FR_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11L,   ... )

title: Run Force-Directed Layout (Fruchterman-Reingold algorithm) — RunFR
text: object object. can Seurat object, Neighbor object, Graph object. Default NULL. ... Additional arguments passed igraph::layout_with_fr. reduction dimensionality reduction use. Default "pca". dims dimensions used. Default NULL. features character vector features use. Default NULL. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. layer layer use. Default data. graph name Graph object used. Default NULL. neighbor name Neighbor object used. Default NULL. k.param number nearest neighbors consider. Default 20. ndim number dimensions force-directed layout. Default 2. niter number iterations force-directed layout. Default 500. reduction.name name reduction stored Seurat object. Default "fr". reduction.key prefix column names force-directed layout embeddings. Default "FR_". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed.use Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Run generalized principal components analysis (GLMPCA) — RunGLMPCA
code: RunGLMPCA(object, ...)  # S3 method for class 'Seurat' RunGLMPCA(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = "counts",   features = NULL,   L = 5,   fam = c("poi", "nb", "nb2", "binom", "mult", "bern"),   rev.gmlpca = FALSE,   ndims.print = 1:5,   nfeatures.print = 30,   reduction.name = "glmpca",   reduction.key = "GLMPC_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )  # S3 method for class 'Assay' RunGLMPCA(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = "counts",   features = NULL,   L = 5,   fam = c("poi", "nb", "nb2", "binom", "mult", "bern"),   rev.gmlpca = FALSE,   ndims.print = 1:5,   nfeatures.print = 30,   reduction.key = "GLMPC_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )  # S3 method for class 'Assay5' RunGLMPCA(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = "counts",   features = NULL,   L = 5,   fam = c("poi", "nb", "nb2", "binom", "mult", "bern"),   rev.gmlpca = FALSE,   ndims.print = 1:5,   nfeatures.print = 30,   reduction.key = "GLMPC_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )  # Default S3 method RunGLMPCA(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = "counts",   features = NULL,   L = 5,   fam = c("poi", "nb", "nb2", "binom", "mult", "bern"),   rev.gmlpca = FALSE,   ndims.print = 1:5,   nfeatures.print = 30,   reduction.key = "GLMPC_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )

title: Run generalized principal components analysis (GLMPCA) — RunGLMPCA
text: object object. Can Seurat object, assay object, matrix-like object. ... Additional arguments passed glmpca::glmpca function. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. layer layer use. Default data. features character vector features use. Default NULL. L number components computed. Default 5. fam family generalized linear model used. Currently supported values "poi", "nb", "nb2", "binom", "mult", "bern". Default "poi". rev.gmlpca Whether perform reverse GLMPCA (.e., transpose input matrix) running analysis. Default FALSE. ndims.print dimensions (number components) print output. Default 1:5. nfeatures.print number features print output. Default 30. reduction.name name reduction stored Seurat object. Default "glmpca". reduction.key prefix column names basis vectors. Default "GLMPC_". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed.use Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.
