what: Single-cell reference mapping with Symphony method — RunSymphonyMap
title: Single-cell reference mapping with Symphony method — RunSymphonyMap
text: Single-cell reference mapping Symphony method

title: Single-cell reference mapping with Symphony method — RunSymphonyMap
code: RunSymphonyMap(   srt_query,   srt_ref,   query_assay = NULL,   ref_assay = srt_ref[[ref_pca]]@assay.used,   ref_pca = NULL,   ref_harmony = NULL,   ref_umap = NULL,   ref_group = NULL,   projection_method = c("model", "knn"),   nn_method = NULL,   k = 30,   distance_metric = "cosine",   vote_fun = "mean" )

title: Single-cell reference mapping with Symphony method — RunSymphonyMap
text: srt_query object class Seurat annotated cell types. srt_ref Seurat object count matrix representing reference object. provided, similarities calculated cells query reference objects. provided, similarities calculated within query object. query_assay assay use query object. provided, default assay query object used. ref_assay assay use reference object. provided, default assay reference object used. ref_pca PCA reduction reference object use calculating distance metric. ref_harmony Harmony reduction reference object use calculating distance metric. ref_umap character string specifying name UMAP reduction reference object. provided, first UMAP reduction found reference object used. ref_group grouping variable reference object. variable used group cells heatmap columns. provided, cells treated one group. projection_method character string specifying projection method use. Options "model" "knn". "model" selected, function try use pre-trained UMAP model reference object projection. "knn" selected, function directly find nearest neighbors using distance metric. nn_method character string specifying nearest neighbor search method use. Options "raw", "annoy", "rann". "raw" selected, function use brute-force method find nearest neighbors. "annoy" selected, function use Annoy library approximate nearest neighbor search. "rann" selected, function use RANN library approximate nearest neighbor search. provided, function choose search method based size query reference datasets. k number nearest neighbors find cell query object. distance_metric distance metric use calculating pairwise distances cells. Options include: "pearson", "spearman", "cosine", "correlation", "jaccard", "ejaccard", "dice", "edice", "hamman", "simple matching", "faith". Additional distance metrics can also used, "euclidean", "manhattan", "hamming", etc. vote_fun character string specifying function used aggregating nearest neighbors reference object. Options "mean", "median", "sum", "min", "max", "sd", "var", etc. provided, default "mean".

what: Run TriMap (Large-scale Dimensionality Reduction Using Triplets) — RunTriMap
title: Run TriMap (Large-scale Dimensionality Reduction Using Triplets) — RunTriMap
text: Run TriMap (Large-scale Dimensionality Reduction Using Triplets)

title: Run TriMap (Large-scale Dimensionality Reduction Using Triplets) — RunTriMap
code: RunTriMap(object, ...)  # S3 method for class 'Seurat' RunTriMap(   object,   reduction = "pca",   dims = NULL,   features = NULL,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   n_components = 2,   n_inliers = 12,   n_outliers = 4,   n_random = 3,   distance_method = "euclidean",   lr = 0.1,   n_iters = 400,   apply_pca = TRUE,   opt_method = "dbd",   reduction.name = "trimap",   reduction.key = "TriMap_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11L,   ... )  # Default S3 method RunTriMap(   object,   assay = NULL,   n_components = 2,   n_inliers = 12,   n_outliers = 4,   n_random = 3,   distance_method = "euclidean",   lr = 0.1,   n_iters = 400,   apply_pca = TRUE,   opt_method = "dbd",   reduction.key = "TriMap_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11L,   ... )

title: Run TriMap (Large-scale Dimensionality Reduction Using Triplets) — RunTriMap
text: object object. can Seurat object, matrix-like object, Neighbor object, Graph object. ... Additional arguments passed trimap.TRIMAP function. reduction dimensionality reduction use. Default "pca". dims dimensions used. Default NULL. features character vector features use. Default NULL. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. layer layer use. Default data. n_components number TriMap components. Default 2. n_inliers number nearest neighbors forming nearest neighbor triplets. Default 12. n_outliers number outliers forming nearest neighbor triplets. Default 4. n_random number random triplets per point. Default 3. distance_method character string specifying distance metric TriMap. Options : "euclidean", "manhattan", "angular", "cosine", "hamming". Default "euclidean". lr learning rate TriMap. Default 0.1. n_iters number iterations TriMap. Default 400. apply_pca Whether apply PCA nearest-neighbor calculation. Default TRUE. opt_method character string specifying optimization method TriMap. Options : "dbd", "sd", "momentum". Default "dbd". reduction.name character string specifying name reduction stored Seurat object. Default "trimap". reduction.key character string specifying prefix column names TriMap embeddings. Default "TriMap_". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed.use Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Run TriMap (Large-scale Dimensionality Reduction Using Triplets) — RunTriMap
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ data(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- RunTriMap(   object = pancreas_sub,   features = SeuratObject::VariableFeatures(pancreas_sub) ) CellDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "CellType",   reduction = "trimap" ) } # }

what: Run UMAP (Uniform Manifold Approximation and Projection) — RunUMAP2
title: Run UMAP (Uniform Manifold Approximation and Projection) — RunUMAP2
text: Run UMAP (Uniform Manifold Approximation Projection)

title: Run UMAP (Uniform Manifold Approximation and Projection) — RunUMAP2
code: RunUMAP2(object, ...)  # S3 method for class 'Seurat' RunUMAP2(   object,   reduction = "pca",   dims = NULL,   features = NULL,   neighbor = NULL,   graph = NULL,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   umap.method = "uwot",   reduction.model = NULL,   n_threads = NULL,   return.model = FALSE,   n.neighbors = 30L,   n.components = 2L,   metric = "cosine",   n.epochs = 200L,   cores = 1,   min.dist = 0.3,   set.op.mix.ratio = 1,   local.connectivity = 1L,   negative.sample.rate = 5L,   a = NULL,   b = NULL,   learning.rate = 1,   repulsion.strength = 1,   reduction.name = "umap",   reduction.key = "UMAP_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )  # Default S3 method RunUMAP2(   object,   assay = NULL,   umap.method = "uwot",   reduction.model = NULL,   n_threads = NULL,   return.model = FALSE,   n.neighbors = 30L,   n.components = 2L,   metric = "cosine",   n.epochs = 200L,   cores = 1,   min.dist = 0.3,   set.op.mix.ratio = 1,   local.connectivity = 1L,   negative.sample.rate = 5L,   a = NULL,   b = NULL,   learning.rate = 1,   repulsion.strength = 1,   reduction.key = "UMAP_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11L,   ... )

title: Run UMAP (Uniform Manifold Approximation and Projection) — RunUMAP2
text: object object. can Seurat object, matrix-like object, Neighbor object, Graph object. ... Additional arguments passed UMAP. reduction dimensionality reduction use. Default "pca". dims dimensions used. Default NULL. features character vector features use. Default NULL. neighbor name Neighbor object used. Default NULL. graph name Graph object used. Default NULL. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. layer layer use. Default data. umap.method UMAP method used. Options "naive" "uwot". Default "uwot". reduction.model DimReduc object containing pre-trained UMAP model. Default NULL. n_threads Num threads used. return.model Whether return UMAP model. Default FALSE. n.neighbors number nearest neighbors used. Default 30. n.components number UMAP components. Default 2. metric metric function used distance calculations. using string, available metrics : euclidean, manhattan. available generalized metrics : cosine, pearson, pearson2. Note triangle inequality may satisfied generalized metrics, hence knn search may optimal. using metric.function function, signature must function(matrix, origin, target) compute distance origin column target columns. Default "cosine". n.epochs number iterations performed layout optimization UMAP. Default 200. cores spread parameter UMAP, used automatic estimation /b parameters. Default 1. min.dist minimum distance UMAP embeddings, determines close points appear final layout. Default 0.3. set.op.mix.ratio Interpolate (fuzzy) union intersection set operation used combine local fuzzy simplicial sets obtain global fuzzy simplicial sets. fuzzy set operations use product t-norm. value parameter 0.0 1.0; value 1.0 use pure fuzzy union, 0.0 use pure fuzzy intersection. local.connectivity local connectivity, used construction fuzzy simplicial set. Default 1. negative.sample.rate negative sample rate UMAP optimization. Determines many non-neighbor points used per point per iteration layout optimization. Default 5. parameter UMAP optimization. Contributes gradient calculations layout optimization. left NA, suitable value estimated automatically. Default NULL. b parameter b UMAP optimization. Details see parameter . learning.rate initial value "learning rate" layout optimization. Default 1. repulsion.strength numeric value determines, together alpha, learning rate layout optimization. Default 1. reduction.name name reduction stored Seurat object. Default "umap". reduction.key prefix column names UMAP embeddings. Default "UMAP_". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed.use Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Run WOT analysis — RunWOT
code: RunWOT(   srt = NULL,   assay_x = "RNA",   layer_x = "counts",   assay_y = c("spliced", "unspliced"),   layer_y = "counts",   adata = NULL,   group.by = NULL,   time_field = "Time",   growth_iters = 3L,   tmap_out = "tmaps/tmap_out",   time_from = NULL,   time_to = NULL,   get_coupling = FALSE,   recalculate = FALSE,   palette = "Chinese",   palcolor = NULL,   show_plot = FALSE,   save_plot = FALSE,   plot_format = c("pdf", "png", "svg"),   plot_dpi = 300,   plot_prefix = "wot",   dirpath = "./",   return_seurat = !is.null(srt),   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run WOT analysis — RunWOT
text: srt Seurat object. Default NULL. provided, adata ignored. assay_x Assay convert main data matrix anndata object. Default "RNA". layer_x Layer name assay_x Seurat object. Default "counts". assay_y Assays convert layers anndata object. Default c("spliced", "unspliced"). layer_y Layer names assay_y Seurat object. Default "counts". adata anndata object. Default NULL. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . time_field character string specifying column name adata.obs srt@meta.data contains time information. growth_iters number growth iterations perform OT Model computation. Default 3. tmap_out character string specifying path store computed transport maps. time_from starting time point trajectory fate analysis. time_to ending time point trajectory fate analysis. provided, trajectory fate analysis specified time_from performed. get_coupling Whether compute store coupling matrix specified time_from time_to. Default FALSE. recalculate Whether recalculate transport maps even already exist specified tmap_out location. Default FALSE. palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "Chinese". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. show_plot Whether show plot. Default FALSE. save_plot Whether save plots files. Default FALSE. plot_format Format saved plots: "png" (default), "pdf", "svg". plot_dpi Resolution (DPI) saved plots. Default 300. plot_prefix Prefix saved plot filenames. Default "cellrank". dirpath directory save plots. Default "./cellrank". return_seurat Whether return Seurat object instead anndata object. Default TRUE. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

code: Scanorama_integrate(   srt_merge = NULL,   batch = NULL,   append = TRUE,   srt_list = NULL,   assay = NULL,   do_normalization = NULL,   normalization_method = "LogNormalize",   do_HVF_finding = TRUE,   HVF_source = "separate",   HVF_method = "vst",   nHVF = 2000,   HVF_min_intersection = 1,   HVF = NULL,   do_scaling = TRUE,   vars_to_regress = NULL,   regression_model = "linear",   Scanorama_dims_use = NULL,   nonlinear_reduction = "umap",   nonlinear_reduction_dims = c(2, 3),   nonlinear_reduction_params = list(),   force_nonlinear_reduction = TRUE,   neighbor_metric = "euclidean",   neighbor_k = 20L,   cluster_algorithm = "louvain",   cluster_resolution = 0.6,   return_corrected = FALSE,   Scanorama_params = list(),   verbose = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: The Scanorama integration function — Scanorama_integrate
text: srt_merge merged `Seurat` object includes batch information. batch character string specifying batch variable name. append Whether integrated data appended original Seurat object (srt_merge). Default TRUE. srt_list list Seurat objects checked preprocessed. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. do_normalization Whether data normalization performed. Default TRUE. normalization_method normalization method used. Possible values "LogNormalize", "SCT", "TFIDF". Default "LogNormalize". do_HVF_finding Whether perform high variable feature finding. TRUE, function force find highly variable features (HVF) using specified HVF method. HVF_source source highly variable features. Possible values "global" "separate". Default "separate". HVF_method method use finding highly variable features. Options "vst", "mvp", "disp". Default "vst". nHVF number highly variable features select. NULL, highly variable features used. Default 2000. HVF_min_intersection feature needs present batches minimum number times order considered highly variable. Default 1. HVF vector feature names use highly variable features. NULL, function use highly variable features identified HVF method. do_scaling Whether perform scaling. TRUE, function force scale data using Seurat::ScaleData function. vars_to_regress vector variable names include additional regression variables. Default NULL. regression_model regression model use scaling. Options "linear", "poisson", "negativebinomial". Default "linear". Scanorama_dims_use vector specifying dimensions returned Scanorama utilized downstream cell cluster finding nonlinear reduction. set NULL, returned dimensions used default. nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". nonlinear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep nonlinear dimensionality reduction. vector provided, different numbers dimensions can specified method. Default c(2, 3). nonlinear_reduction_params list parameters pass nonlinear dimensionality reduction method. force_nonlinear_reduction Whether force nonlinear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. Default TRUE. neighbor_metric distance metric use finding neighbors. Options "euclidean", "cosine", "manhattan", "hamming". Default "euclidean". neighbor_k number nearest neighbors use finding neighbors. Default 20. cluster_algorithm clustering algorithm use. Options "louvain", "slm", "leiden". Default "louvain". cluster_resolution resolution parameter use clustering. Larger values result fewer clusters. Default 0.6. return_corrected Logical indicating whether return corrected data. Default `FALSE`. Scanorama_params list parameters scanorama.correct function. Default `list()`. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

Default NULL. regression_model regression model use scaling. Options "linear", "poisson", "negativebinomial". Default 50. linear_reduction_dims_use dimensions use downstream analysis. NULL, estimated dimensions stored linear reduction used available; otherwise, first 50 dimensions used fallback. linear_reduction_params list parameters pass linear dimensionality reduction method. force_linear_reduction Whether force linear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "louvain". cluster_resolution resolution parameter use clustering. Larger values result fewer clusters. Default 0.6. FindIntegrationAnchors_params list parameters Seurat::FindIntegrationAnchors function. Default `list()`. IntegrateData_params list parameters Seurat::IntegrateData function. Default `list()`. title: Transcript-averaged cell scoring (TACS) — TACSPlot
text: TACS method plotting FACS-like plot two features based sc-RNA-seq data. two query features, 100 features similar expression patterns selected ranked Pearson correlation query. process akin compensation, intersection feature lists removed list. log normalized expression resulting features averaged within cell, resulting quantities plotted. function based simple scheme: choose features similar ones specified average reduce noise.

title: Transcript-averaged cell scoring (TACS) — TACSPlot
code: TACSPlot(   srt,   ref_srt = NULL,   assay = "RNA",   layer = "data",   group.by = NULL,   feature1,   feature2,   cutoffs = NULL,   density = FALSE,   palette = "Chinese",   num_features_add = 100,   features_predetermined = FALSE,   aggregator = "sum",   remove_outliers = FALSE,   aspect.ratio = 1,   title = NULL,   subtitle = NULL,   xlab = NULL,   ylab = NULL,   suffix = " expression level",   legend.position = "right",   legend.direction = "vertical",   theme_use = "theme_scop",   theme_args = list(),   include_all = FALSE,   all_color = "grey20",   quadrants_line_color = "grey30",   quadrants_line_type = "solid",   quadrants_line_width = 0.3,   quadrants_label_size = 3,   density_alpha = NULL,   bins = 20,   h = NULL,   nrow = NULL,   ncol = NULL,   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: Transcript-averaged cell scoring (TACS) — TACSPlot
text: srt Seurat object. ref_srt Seurat object. dataset perturbed way substantially alter feature-feature correlations, example different time points present certain cell types mostly depleted, can feed reference srt, TACS choose axes based reference data. Default NULL. assay assay use. Default "RNA". layer layer use. Default data. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . feature1 Horizontal axis plot mimics feature. Character, usually length 1 possibly longer. feature2 Vertical axis plot mimics feature. Character, usually length 1 possibly longer. cutoffs given, divide plot four quadrants annotate percentages. Can numeric vector length 1 2, list two numeric vectors x y axes respectively. density TRUE, plot contours instead points. palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "Chinese". num_features_add axis shows simple sum similar features. many (removing overlap). features_predetermined FALSE, plot sum many features similar feature1 instead feature1 alone (feature2). See GetSimilarFeatures. TRUE, plot sum features given. aggregator combine correlations finding similar features. Options: "sum" (default), "min" (""-like filter), "max", "mean". remove_outliers TRUE, remove outliers plot. Default FALSE. aspect.ratio Aspect ratio panel. Default 1. title text title. Default NULL. subtitle text subtitle plot displayed title. Default NULL. xlab x-axis label plot. Default NULL. ylab y-axis label plot. Default NULL. suffix suffix axis labels. Default " expression level". legend.position position legends, one "none", "left", "right", "bottom", "top". Default "right". legend.direction direction legend plot. Can one "vertical" "horizontal". theme_use Theme used. Can character string theme function. Default "theme_scop". theme_args arguments passed theme_use. Default list(). include_all TRUE, include panel cells. Default FALSE. all_color color cells panel. Default "grey20". quadrants_line_color color quadrants lines. Default "grey30". quadrants_line_type type quadrants lines. Default "solid". quadrants_line_width width quadrants lines. Default 0.3. quadrants_label_size size quadrants labels. Default 3. density_alpha alpha density plot. Default NULL. bins Number bins density plot. Default 20. h Bandwidth density plot. Default NULL. nrow Number rows combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. ncol Number columns combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. ... Additional parameters passed ggplot2::stat_density2d.

title: Volcano Plot — VolcanoPlot
code: VolcanoPlot(   srt,   group.by = NULL,   test.use = "wilcox",   res = NULL,   DE_threshold = "avg_log2FC > 0 & p_val_adj < 0.05",   x_metric = "diff_pct",   palette = "RdBu",   palcolor = NULL,   pt.size = 1,   pt.alpha = 1,   cols.highlight = "black",   sizes.highlight = 1,   alpha.highlight = 1,   stroke.highlight = 0.5,   nlabel = 5,   features_label = NULL,   label.fg = "black",   label.bg = "white",   label.bg.r = 0.1,   label.size = 4,   aspect.ratio = NULL,   xlab = x_metric,   ylab = "-log10(p-adjust)",   theme_use = "theme_scop",   theme_args = list(),   combine = TRUE,   nrow = NULL,   ncol = NULL,   byrow = TRUE )

title: Volcano Plot — VolcanoPlot
text: srt object class Seurat containing results differential expression analysis. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . test.use character string specifying type statistical test use. Default "wilcox". res data.frame data.table differential expression results. res provided, srt ignored. data.frame must contain columns: gene, group1 (factor character), avg_log2FC, p_val_adj, optionally pct.1 pct.2 calculating diff_pct. DE_threshold character string specifying threshold differential expression (used highlight significant genes plot types). Default "avg_log2FC > 0 & p_val_adj < 0.05". x_metric character string specifying metric use x-axis (volcano plot). Default "diff_pct". palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "RdBu". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. pt.size size points. Default 1. pt.alpha transparency data points. Default 1. cols.highlight character string specifying color highlighted points. Default "black". sizes.highlight size highlighted points. Default 1. alpha.highlight transparency highlighted points. Default 1. stroke.highlight stroke width highlighted points. Default 0.5. nlabel integer value specifying number labeled points per group. Default 5. features_label character vector specifying feature labels plot. Default NULL. label.fg character string specifying color labels' foreground. Default "black". label.bg character string specifying color labels' background. Default "white". label.bg.r radius rounding labels' background. Default 0.1. label.size size labels. Default 4. aspect.ratio Aspect ratio panel. Default NULL. xlab character string specifying x-axis label. ylab character string specifying y-axis label. theme_use Theme use plot. Default "theme_scop". theme_args list additional arguments pass theme function. Default list(). combine Whether combine multiple plots one. Default TRUE. nrow Number rows combined plots. Default NULL. ncol Number columns combined plots. Default NULL. byrow Whether fill plots row. Default TRUE.

code: fastMNN5_integrate(   srt_merge = NULL,   batch = NULL,   append = TRUE,   srt_list = NULL,   assay = NULL,   do_normalization = NULL,   normalization_method = "LogNormalize",   do_HVF_finding = TRUE,   HVF_source = "separate",   HVF_method = "vst",   nHVF = 2000,   HVF_min_intersection = 1,   HVF = NULL,   fastMNN_dims_use = NULL,   nonlinear_reduction = "umap",   nonlinear_reduction_dims = c(2, 3),   nonlinear_reduction_params = list(),   force_nonlinear_reduction = TRUE,   neighbor_metric = "euclidean",   neighbor_k = 20L,   cluster_algorithm = "louvain",   cluster_resolution = 0.6,   IntegrateLayers_params = list(),   verbose = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: Seurat v5 fastMNN integration — fastMNN5_integrate
text: srt_merge merged `Seurat` object includes batch information. batch character string specifying batch variable name. append Whether integrated data appended original Seurat object (srt_merge). Default TRUE. srt_list list Seurat objects checked preprocessed. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. do_normalization Whether data normalization performed. Default TRUE. normalization_method normalization method used. Possible values "LogNormalize", "SCT", "TFIDF". Default "LogNormalize". do_HVF_finding Whether perform high variable feature finding. TRUE, function force find highly variable features (HVF) using specified HVF method. HVF_source source highly variable features. Possible values "global" "separate". Default "separate". HVF_method method use finding highly variable features. Options "vst", "mvp", "disp". Default "vst". nHVF number highly variable features select. NULL, highly variable features used. Default 2000. HVF_min_intersection feature needs present batches minimum number times order considered highly variable. Default 1. HVF vector feature names use highly variable features. NULL, function use highly variable features identified HVF method. fastMNN_dims_use vector specifying integrated dimensions used downstream clustering nonlinear reduction. nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". nonlinear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep nonlinear dimensionality reduction. vector provided, different numbers dimensions can specified method. Default c(2, 3). nonlinear_reduction_params list parameters pass nonlinear dimensionality reduction method. force_nonlinear_reduction Whether force nonlinear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. Default TRUE. neighbor_metric distance metric use finding neighbors. Options "euclidean", "cosine", "manhattan", "hamming". Default "euclidean". neighbor_k number nearest neighbors use finding neighbors. Default 20. cluster_algorithm clustering algorithm use. Options "louvain", "slm", "leiden". Default "louvain". cluster_resolution resolution parameter use clustering. Larger values result fewer clusters. Default 0.6. IntegrateLayers_params list parameters passed [Seurat::IntegrateLayers]. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: The integration workflow — integration_scop
text: srt_merge merged `Seurat` object includes batch information. batch character string specifying batch variable name. append Whether integrated data appended original Seurat object (srt_merge). Default TRUE. srt_list list Seurat objects checked preprocessed. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. integration_method character vector specifying integration method use. Supported methods : "Uncorrected", "Seurat", "CCA", "RPCA", "scVI", "scVI5", "MNN", "fastMNN", "fastMNN5", "Harmony", "Harmony5", "Scanorama", "BBKNN", "CSS", "Coralysis", "LIGER", "Conos", "ComBat". Default "Uncorrected". do_normalization Whether data normalization performed. Default TRUE. normalization_method normalization method used. Possible values "LogNormalize", "SCT", "TFIDF". Default "LogNormalize". do_HVF_finding Whether perform high variable feature finding. TRUE, function force find highly variable features (HVF) using specified HVF method. HVF_source source highly variable features. Possible values "global" "separate". Default "separate". HVF_method method use finding highly variable features. Options "vst", "mvp", "disp". Default "vst". nHVF number highly variable features select. NULL, highly variable features used. Default 2000. HVF_min_intersection feature needs present batches minimum number times order considered highly variable. Default 1. HVF vector feature names use highly variable features. NULL, function use highly variable features identified HVF method. do_scaling Whether perform scaling. TRUE, function force scale data using Seurat::ScaleData function. vars_to_regress vector variable names include additional regression variables. Default NULL. regression_model regression model use scaling. Options "linear", "poisson", "negativebinomial". Default "linear". scale_within_batch Whether scale data within batch. valid integration_method one "Uncorrected", "Seurat", "MNN", "Harmony", "BBKNN", "CSS", "ComBat". linear_reduction linear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "pca", "svd", "ica", "nmf", "mds", "glmpca". Default "pca". linear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep linear dimensionality reduction. Default 50. linear_reduction_dims_use dimensions use downstream analysis. NULL, estimated dimensions stored linear reduction used available; otherwise, first 50 dimensions used fallback. linear_reduction_params list parameters pass linear dimensionality reduction method. force_linear_reduction Whether force linear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". nonlinear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep nonlinear dimensionality reduction. vector provided, different numbers dimensions can specified method. Default c(2, 3). nonlinear_reduction_params list parameters pass nonlinear dimensionality reduction method. force_nonlinear_reduction Whether force nonlinear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. Default TRUE. neighbor_metric distance metric use finding neighbors. Options "euclidean", "cosine", "manhattan", "hamming". Default "euclidean". neighbor_k number nearest neighbors use finding neighbors. Default 20. cluster_algorithm clustering algorithm use. Options "louvain", "slm", "leiden". Default "louvain". cluster_resolution resolution parameter use clustering. Larger values result fewer clusters. Default 0.6. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. ... Additional arguments passed integration method functions.

what: A subsetted version of human 'panc8' datasets — panc8_sub
title: A subsetted version of human 'panc8' datasets — panc8_sub
text: Human pancreatic islet cell datasets produced across four technologies, SMART-Seq2 (E-MTAB-5061), CelSeq (GSE81076), CelSeq2 (GSE85241), Fluidigm C1 (GSE86469), SeuratData package. data set panc8, 200 cells downsampled form panc8_sub dataset.

title: A subsetted version of human 'panc8' datasets — panc8_sub
text: Seurat object.

title: A subsetted version of human 'panc8' datasets — panc8_sub
A subsetted version of human 'panc8' datasets — panc8_sub
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ if (interactive()) {   data(pancreas_sub)   if (!require("SeuratData", quietly = TRUE)) {     pak::pak("satijalab/seurat-data")   }   library(SeuratData)   library(Seurat)   InstallData("panc8")   data(panc8)   panc8 <- UpdateSeuratObject(panc8)   set.seed(98)   cells_sub <- unlist(     lapply(       split(colnames(panc8), panc8$dataset),       function(x) sample(x, size = 200)     )   )   panc8_sub <- subset(panc8, cells = cells_sub)   counts <- GetAssayData5(     panc8_sub,     layer = "counts"   )   panc8_sub <- CreateSeuratObject(     counts = counts,     meta.data = panc8_sub@meta.data   )   panc8_sub <- panc8_sub[Matrix::rowSums(counts) > 0, ]   panc8_sub <- panc8_sub[toupper(     rownames(panc8_sub)   ) %in% toupper(     rownames(pancreas_sub)   ), ]   panc8_sub$celltype <- gsub("_", "-", panc8_sub$celltype)   panc8_sub$celltype <- gsub(" ", "-", panc8_sub$celltype)   usethis::use_data(     panc8_sub,     compress = "xz",     overwrite = TRUE   ) } } # }

title: A subsetted version of mouse 'pancreas' datasets — pancreas_sub
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ if (interactive()) {   library(Seurat)   library(reticulate)   PrepareEnv()   check_python("scvelo")   scv <- import("scvelo")   adata <- scv$datasets$pancreas()   pancreas <- adata_to_srt(adata)   set.seed(98)   cells <- sample(colnames(pancreas), size = 1000)   pancreas_sub <- pancreas[, cells]   pancreas_sub <- pancreas_sub[Matrix::rowSums(     GetAssayData5(       pancreas_sub,       layer = "counts"     )   ) > 0, ]   pancreas_sub[["CellType"]] <- pancreas_sub[["clusters_coarse"]]   pancreas_sub[["SubCellType"]] <- pancreas_sub[["clusters"]]   pancreas_sub[["clusters_coarse"]] <- pancreas_sub[["clusters"]] <- NULL   pancreas_sub[["Phase"]] <- ifelse(     pancreas_sub$S_score > pancreas_sub$G2M_score,     "S",     "G2M"   )   pancreas_sub[["Phase"]][apply(     pancreas_sub[[]][, c("S_score", "G2M_score")],     1,     max   ) < 0, ] <- "G1"   pancreas_sub[["Phase", drop = TRUE]] <- factor(     pancreas_sub[["Phase", drop = TRUE]],     levels = c("G1", "S", "G2M")   )   pancreas_sub$CellType <- gsub("_", "-", pancreas_sub$CellType)   pancreas_sub$CellType <- gsub(" ", "-", pancreas_sub$CellType)   pancreas_sub$SubCellType <- gsub("_", "-", pancreas_sub$SubCellType)   pancreas_sub$SubCellType <- gsub(" ", "-", pancreas_sub$SubCellType)   pancreas_sub@reductions$X_pca <- NULL   pancreas_sub@reductions$X_umap <- NULL   usethis::use_data(     pancreas_sub,     compress = "xz",     overwrite = TRUE   ) } } # }

title: Remove Python packages from conda environment — remove_python
text: packages character vector package names remove. envname name conda environment. NULL, environment name set "scop_env". Default NULL. conda path conda executable. Use "auto" allow automatically finding appropriate conda binary. pip Whether use pip package removal. Default FALSE (use conda). force Whether force removal without confirmation. Default FALSE. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

code: scVI5_integrate(   srt_merge = NULL,   batch = NULL,   append = TRUE,   srt_list = NULL,   assay = NULL,   do_normalization = NULL,   normalization_method = "LogNormalize",   do_HVF_finding = TRUE,   HVF_source = "separate",   HVF_method = "vst",   nHVF = 2000,   HVF_min_intersection = 1,   HVF = NULL,   scVI_dims_use = NULL,   nonlinear_reduction = "umap",   nonlinear_reduction_dims = c(2, 3),   nonlinear_reduction_params = list(),   force_nonlinear_reduction = TRUE,   neighbor_metric = "euclidean",   neighbor_k = 20L,   cluster_algorithm = "louvain",   cluster_resolution = 0.6,   cores = NULL,   IntegrateLayers_params = list(),   verbose = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: Seurat v5 scVI integration — scVI5_integrate
text: srt_merge merged `Seurat` object includes batch information. batch character string specifying batch variable name. append Whether integrated data appended original Seurat object (srt_merge). Default TRUE. srt_list list Seurat objects checked preprocessed. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. do_normalization Whether data normalization performed. Default TRUE. normalization_method normalization method used. Possible values "LogNormalize", "SCT", "TFIDF". Default "LogNormalize". do_HVF_finding Whether perform high variable feature finding. TRUE, function force find highly variable features (HVF) using specified HVF method. HVF_source source highly variable features. Possible values "global" "separate". Default "separate". HVF_method method use finding highly variable features. Options "vst", "mvp", "disp". Default "vst". nHVF number highly variable features select. NULL, highly variable features used. Default 2000. HVF_min_intersection feature needs present batches minimum number times order considered highly variable. Default 1. HVF vector feature names use highly variable features. NULL, function use highly variable features identified HVF method. scVI_dims_use vector specifying integrated dimensions used downstream clustering nonlinear reduction. nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". nonlinear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep nonlinear dimensionality reduction. vector provided, different numbers dimensions can specified method. Default c(2, 3). nonlinear_reduction_params list parameters pass nonlinear dimensionality reduction method. force_nonlinear_reduction Whether force nonlinear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. Default TRUE. neighbor_metric distance metric use finding neighbors. Options "euclidean", "cosine", "manhattan", "hamming". Default "euclidean". neighbor_k number nearest neighbors use finding neighbors. Default 20. cluster_algorithm clustering algorithm use. Options "louvain", "slm", "leiden". Default "louvain". cluster_resolution resolution parameter use clustering. Larger values result fewer clusters. Default 0.6. cores Number DataLoader worker processes scVI training. NULL (default) uses PyTorch default (0, single-process). Increase speed data loading multi-core machines. IntegrateLayers_params list parameters passed [Seurat::IntegrateLayers]. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: The scVI integration function — scVI_integrate
text: srt_merge merged `Seurat` object includes batch information. batch character string specifying batch variable name. append Whether integrated data appended original Seurat object (srt_merge). Default TRUE. srt_list list Seurat objects checked preprocessed. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. do_normalization Whether data normalization performed. Default TRUE. normalization_method normalization method used. Possible values "LogNormalize", "SCT", "TFIDF". Default "LogNormalize". do_HVF_finding Whether perform high variable feature finding. TRUE, function force find highly variable features (HVF) using specified HVF method. HVF_source source highly variable features. Possible values "global" "separate". Default "separate". HVF_method method use finding highly variable features. Options "vst", "mvp", "disp". Default "vst". nHVF number highly variable features select. NULL, highly variable features used. Default 2000. HVF_min_intersection feature needs present batches minimum number times order considered highly variable. Default 1. HVF vector feature names use highly variable features. NULL, function use highly variable features identified HVF method. scVI_dims_use vector specifying dimensions returned scVI utilized downstream cell cluster finding nonlinear reduction. set NULL, returned dimensions used default. nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". nonlinear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep nonlinear dimensionality reduction. vector provided, different numbers dimensions can specified method. Default c(2, 3). nonlinear_reduction_params list parameters pass nonlinear dimensionality reduction method. force_nonlinear_reduction Whether force nonlinear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. Default TRUE. neighbor_metric distance metric use finding neighbors. Options "euclidean", "cosine", "manhattan", "hamming". Default "euclidean". neighbor_k number nearest neighbors use finding neighbors. Default 20. cluster_algorithm clustering algorithm use. Options "louvain", "slm", "leiden". Default "louvain". cluster_resolution resolution parameter use clustering. Larger values result fewer clusters. Default 0.6. model string indicating scVI model used. Options "SCVI" "PEAKVI". Default `"SCVI"`. SCVI_params list parameters SCVI model. Default `list()`. PEAKVI_params list parameters PEAKVI model. Default `list()`. cores integer setting number threads `scVI`. Default `1`. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Standard workflow for scop — standard_scop
code: standard_scop(   srt,   prefix = "Standard",   assay = NULL,   do_normalization = NULL,   normalization_method = "LogNormalize",   do_HVF_finding = TRUE,   HVF_method = "vst",   nHVF = 2000,   HVF = NULL,   do_scaling = TRUE,   vars_to_regress = NULL,   regression_model = "linear",   linear_reduction = "pca",   linear_reduction_dims = 50,   linear_reduction_dims_use = NULL,   linear_reduction_params = list(),   force_linear_reduction = FALSE,   nonlinear_reduction = "umap",   nonlinear_reduction_dims = c(2, 3),   nonlinear_reduction_params = list(),   force_nonlinear_reduction = TRUE,   neighbor_metric = "euclidean",   neighbor_k = 20L,   cluster_algorithm = "louvain",   cluster_resolution = 0.6,   verbose = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: Standard workflow for scop — standard_scop
text: srt Seurat object. prefix prefix add names intermediate objects created function. Default "Standard". assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. do_normalization Whether perform normalization. NULL, normalization performed specified assay scaled data. normalization_method method use normalization. Options "LogNormalize", "SCT", "TFIDF". Default "LogNormalize". do_HVF_finding Whether perform high variable feature finding. TRUE, function force find highly variable features (HVF) using specified HVF method. HVF_method method use finding highly variable features. Options "vst", "mvp", "disp". Default "vst". nHVF number highly variable features select. NULL, highly variable features used. Default 2000. HVF vector feature names use highly variable features. NULL, function use highly variable features identified HVF method. do_scaling Whether perform scaling. TRUE, function force scale data using Seurat::ScaleData function. vars_to_regress vector feature names use regressors scaling step. NULL, regressors used. regression_model regression model use scaling. Options "linear", "poisson", "negativebinomial". Default "linear". linear_reduction linear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "pca", "svd", "ica", "nmf", "mds", "glmpca". Default "pca". linear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep linear dimensionality reduction. Default 50. linear_reduction_dims_use dimensions use downstream analysis. NULL, estimated dimensions stored linear reduction used available; otherwise, first 50 dimensions used fallback. linear_reduction_params list parameters pass linear dimensionality reduction method. force_linear_reduction Whether force linear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". nonlinear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep nonlinear dimensionality reduction. vector provided, different numbers dimensions can specified method. Default c(2, 3). nonlinear_reduction_params list parameters pass nonlinear dimensionality reduction method. force_nonlinear_reduction Whether force nonlinear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. Default TRUE. neighbor_metric distance metric use finding neighbors. Options "euclidean", "cosine", "manhattan", "hamming". Default "euclidean". neighbor_k number nearest neighbors use finding neighbors. Default 20. cluster_algorithm clustering algorithm use. Options "louvain", "slm", "leiden". Default "louvain". cluster_resolution resolution parameter use clustering. Larger values result fewer clusters. Default 0.6. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: scop 0.8.7
text: Added RunDimsEstimate() DimsEstimatePlot() intrinsic dimensionality estimation reductions, integrated RunDimsReduction() standard_scop() automatically select useful dimensions linear_reduction_dims_use = NULL. Renamed RunDimReduction() RunDimsReduction() updated downstream callers/documentation accordingly. standard_scop(): linear_reduction_dims_use = NULL, now uses estimated dimensions stored reduction (via RunDimsEstimate()) available, fallback first 50 dimensions. Added Seurat v5 integration methods: CCA_integrate(), RPCA_integrate(), fastMNN5_integrate(), Harmony5_integrate(), scVI5_integrate() via Seurat::IntegrateLayers(), exposed integration_scop(). Added Coralysis_integrate() exposed Coralysis integration_scop(), following official Seurat v5 compatible workflow via SingleCellExperiment. Added h5ad_to_srt() reading .h5ad files directly Seurat objects via scanpy.read_h5ad(), automatic CSR/float64 coercion avoid reticulate conversion issues. Layers fail conversion gracefully skipped reported. adata_to_srt(): Improved robustness layer conversion — layer now wrapped tryCatch() individual failures longer abort entire conversion; skipped layers reported warnings. RunCellChat(): Enhanced support condition-specific analyses pairwise merged comparisons via group_column group_cmp parameters. Added RunCellphoneDB() running CellphoneDB cell-cell communication analysis Seurat object official Python package, support species conversion results stored srt@tools[["CellphoneDB"]]. Added RunNichenetr() RunMultiNichenetr() running NicheNet MultiNicheNet analysis Seurat objects standardized result storage. Added unified cell-cell communication plotting functions CCCStatPlot(), CCCHeatmap(), CCCNetworkPlot() CellChat, CellphoneDB, NicheNet, MultiNicheNet results. Remove CellChatPlot(). RunUMAP2(): Fixed reduction lookup check existing reduction names falling back DefaultReduction(), avoiding errors exact reduction name already present.

title: scop 0.8.6
text: Added RunGSVA() gene set variation analysis GSVAPlot() visualization GSVA results. Related issue #146 (@mengxu98). Added RunMetabolism() single-cell metabolism pathway scoring support AUCell, GSVA, ssGSEA, optional VISION, MetabolismPlot() visualization RunMetabolism() now uses scMetabolism KEGG / Reactome metabolism pathway definitions identify metabolism-related terms, rebuilds pathway gene sets updated PrepareDB() annotations, enabling cached database updates cross-species metabolism scoring. Related issue #146 (@mengxu98). Added RunDecontX() integrated optional decontX ambient RNA decontamination RunCellQC(), including contamination metadata, optional decontaminated assay output, threshold-based QC filtering. Related issue #147 (@mengxu98). FeatureStatPlot(): Fixed duplicated X/Y axis titles main title stack = TRUE theme_args title. Stack assembly now strips axis plot titles non-edge panels draws single shared ylab/title via gtable; theme styling theme_args (e.g. axis.title.y, title/plot.title) applied shared grobs. Related issue #145 (@PanSX-Dr). Updated README badge/logo. Removed example datasets ifnb_sub, ref_scHCL, ref_scZCL.

title: scop 0.8.5
text: Default palette changed "Paired" "Chinese". See thisplot::ChineseColors() details. Unified cores parameter across multiple functions (DynamicHeatmap(), FeatureHeatmap(), GroupHeatmap(), heatmap_enrichment()), ensuring cores correctly threaded RunEnrichment(). RunMonocle2() RunMonocle3(): Added xlab ylab parameters, passed internal CellDimPlot() FeatureDimPlot() calls. ListDB(): Now supports multiple species species parameter simultaneously adds Species DB columns output data frame clearer identification. Moved is_outlier thisutils::is_outlier(). configure_apple_silicon_env() (Python function): Added OpenMP compatibility handling macOS arm64 prepending environment lib paths DYLD_FALLBACK_LIBRARY_PATH/DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH preloading libomp.dylib/libiomp5.dylib via ctypes.CDLL(..., RTLD_GLOBAL) reduce scanpy/python-igraph import conflicts. scVI_integrate(): Unified parameter naming renaming num_threads cores consistency across integration functions. Added find_neighbors_and_clusters() run_nonlinear_reduction() helper functions unify operations across integration functions reduce redundant code. TF database now uses AnimalTFDB4 data source. MP database - Web Archive URL year now dynamically determined current date, archive snapshot date MP-related file downloads (VOC_MammalianPhenotype.rpt, MGI_Gene_Model_Coord.rpt, MGI_GenePheno.rpt) extracted server index page ensure consistent versioning. hTFtarget data download URL changed "http://bioinfo.life.hust.edu.cn/static/hTFtarget/file_download/tf-target-infomation.txt" "https://guolab.wchscu.cn/static/hTFtarget/file_download/tf-target-infomation.txt". CSPA data download URL changed "https://wlab.ethz.ch/cspa/data/S1_File.xlsx" "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mengxu98/CSPA/main/S1_File.xlsx". Migrated rliger 2.x workflow (rliger::runIntegration() + rliger::quantileNorm() Seurat object) now prepares/uses ligerScaleData layer via rliger::scaleNotCenter() integration. Updated argument naming/style LIGER_dims_use liger_dims_use, removed legacy quantile-normalization parameter compatibility mapping (ref_dataset), keeping reference supported interface. Optimized installation Python packages Apple Silicon devices. Updated README example code visualizations. regenerating figures, package size reduced ~3 MB.

title: scop 0.8.4
text: FeatureStatPlot() / ExpressionStatPlot(): Fixed box violin x-axis misalignment add_box = TRUE split.. Groups fewer 2 observations now filtered violin density estimation (warning), violin layer uses consistent position_dodge(width = 0.9) match boxplot. Related issue #123 (@oranges7).

title: scop 0.8.3
text: RunDynamicFeatures(): Added PreTSA method dynamic feature fitting. PreTSA algorithm scop re implemented support parallelization higher performance. Original research: PreTSA: computationally efficient modeling temporal spatial gene expression patterns. Use fit_method = "pretsa" B-spline-based piecewise truncated spline analysis; fit_method = "gam" (default) keeps generalized additive models. PreTSA supports knot (0 "auto") max_knot_allowed knot = "auto". Relate issue #133. CellDimPlot() FeatureDimPlot(): Added legend.title parameter (default NULL) control legend title. NULL, default titles used (e.g. group name CellDimPlot, feature empty FeatureDimPlot). ExpressionStatPlot() FeatureStatPlot(): Added legend.title parameter (default NULL) single-legend plots. NULL, default title (e.g. keynm feature/group name) used. FeatureStatPlot() forwards legend.title ExpressionStatPlot(). Moved StatPlot function thisplot::StatPlot. DynamicHeatmap() / heatmap_enrichment(): Fixed incorrect db handling using custom TERM2GENE/TERM2NAME. Enrichment results Database = "custom" incorrectly filtered default db values (e.g. "GO_BP"), causing false “term enriched using threshold” warnings even enrichment succeeded. Relate issue #133 (@1228849000).

title: scop 0.8.2
text: Add DEtestPlot() function, calls original VolcanoPlot() adds two plot types, Manhattan Ring, controlled plot_type parameter (c("volcano", "manhattan", "ring"), default "volcano"). Add standalone functions DEtestManhattanPlot() DEtestRingPlot() direct use. Relate issue #121 (@ericavalentini). Differential expression visualization (DEtestPlot(), VolcanoPlot(), DEtestManhattanPlot(), DEtestRingPlot()): added res parameter accept existing DE results (data.frame). res provided, srt ignored. Data processing supports: (1) group1 cluster column grouped plots; (2) grouping column single panel; (3) gene names row names gene column missing. Relate issue #129 (@mengxu98). PrepareEnv(): Update version parameter specify Python version conda environment. Default "3.11-1" Windows "3.10-1" macOS Unix. Relate issue #103 (@PanSX-Dr). RunNMF(): Add cores parameter RunNMF() optimize printed message. Removed setting Python functions prevents drawing functions causing R crashes. RunPalantir(): Fixed unused plot_format parameter error. parameter now properly excluded arguments passed Python functions. Relate issue #126 (@christinejay990202-dev).

title: scop 0.8.1
text: FeatureHeatmap(): Fixed group_palcolor named vector passed: function previously used first color groups group_palcolor[[1]] vector returns single element. Now group.length 1, vector automatically wrapped list; within_groups = TRUE, group_palcolor expanded line group_palette. GroupHeatmap(): group_palcolor fix FeatureHeatmap(): support named-vector input correct expansion within_groups = TRUE. group_by modified group.unify documentation, involving functions: RunCellRank(), RunDEtest(), VolcanoPlot(), RunEnrichment(), EnrichmentPlot(), RunGSEA(), GSEAPlot(), RunPalantir(), RunPAGA(), RunWOT(), RunSCVELO(), releated #120.

title: scop 0.8.0
text: RunMonocle2(): New function performing Monocle2 trajectory analysis support various dimensionality reduction methods (DDRTree, ICA, tSNE, SimplePPT, L1-graph, SGL-tree). Uses fixed version monocle2 mengxu98/monocle. RunMonocle3(): New function performing Monocle3 trajectory analysis support cell ordering, trajectory learning, pseudotime computation. RunCytoTRACE(): New function running CytoTRACE 2 analysis predict cellular potency scores categories (Differentiated, Unipotent, Oligopotent, Multipotent, Pluripotent, Totipotent) support human mouse species. CytoTRACEPlot(): New function visualizing CytoTRACE 2 analysis results.

title: scop 0.7.9
text: Optimized @inheritParams usage reduce redundant parameter definitions. Unified parameter naming: renamed group_by group.consistency Seurat conventions RunMonocle3(), RunPalantir(), RunSCVELO(), RunWOT(), CellCorHeatmap(), RunDynamicFeatures().

title: scop 0.7.8
text: RunPalantir(): Fixed unused plot_format parameter error. parameter now properly excluded arguments passed Python functions. Relate issue #114 (@Moonerss). RunSCVELO(): Fixed PAGA computation error replacing scv.tl.paga sc.tl.paga (scanpy implementation) better stability. function now uses PAGA implementation RunPAGA() function. RunCellRank(): Fixed GPCCA Schur decomposition error adding fallback mechanism. brandts method fails “subspace_angles” error, function automatically tries krylov method. methods fail, automatically switches CFLARE estimator robust computation. RunCellRank(): Fixed recover_dynamics error ensuring velocity_graph velocity_graph_neg properly set calling scv.tl.recover_dynamics() latent time computation. adata_to_srt(): Removed automatic removal “X_” prefix dimensionality reduction names obsm keys. function now preserves original reduction names stored AnnData objects. Reducing size pancreas_sub example dataset.

title: scop 0.7.7
text: adata_to_srt(): Enhanced support multiple AnnData object types including Python AnnData objects (scanpy/reticulate), R6 AnnData objects anndata package (AnnDataR6), R6 AnnData objects anndataR package (InMemoryAnnData). Added internal helper functions get_adata_element() get_adata_names() better compatibility. Relate issues #67 (@lisch7), #91 (@mengxu98) commit91#issuecomment. RunDEtest(): Fixed error comparing one cluster multiple clusters using group1 group2 parameters. Relate issue #111 (@zhaoxiaoyan9225). AnnotateFeatures(): Fixed bug function fail processing GTF file annotations due column name matching issues data naming. function now correctly handles column name intersections merging annotation data.

title: scop 0.7.6
text: RunDM(): Added automatic PCA-based dimensionality reduction using many features (>1000) speed diffusion map computation. npcs parameter can used control number principal components used pre-processing.

title: scop 0.7.5
text: CellScoring(): Fixed bug function failed build results. Relate issue #98 (@SuperrNaruto). RunDEtest(): Fixed compatibility issue SeuratObject 5.0.0+ replacing deprecated Assays() slot argument LayerData(). Relate issue #100 (@mattizecos). RunDM(): Added automatic PCA-based dimensionality reduction using many features (>1000) speed diffusion map computation. npcs parameter can used control number principal components used pre-processing.

title: scop 0.7.3
text: RunCellTypist(): New function cell type annotation using CellTypist method. CellTypistModels(): New function downloading managing CellTypist pre-trained models.

title: scop 0.7.2
text: RunCellRank(): Performance optimizations code improvements.

title: scop 0.7.1
text: CellDimPlot(): Fixed issue NA values appeared labels. Relate issue #93 (@12345nkjil).

title: scop 0.7.0
text: PrepareEnv(): Integrated uv primary Python package installer improved installation speed. check_python(): Now uses uv primary installation tool pip fallback, significantly improving package installation speed. Added find_uv() install_uv() internal functions managing uv package manager installation detection.

title: scop 0.6.6
text: Standardized return value tags: Changed @returns @return consistency. Unified parameter documentation: Replaced \code{value} Markdown backticks `value` format. Standardized default value descriptions. Added @md tags: Added @md tags functions using Markdown syntax documentation. Enhanced cross-references: Added @seealso links related functions appropriate.

title: scop 0.6.5
text: Added comprehensive environment variable configuration prevent crashes calling Python functions, including setting thread limits OMP, OPENBLAS, MKL, NUMBA, libraries. improves stability platforms, especially Apple silicon Macs. Added accept_conda_tos() function automatically accept conda Terms Service required channels, improving conda environment setup process. Fixed conda Terms Service acceptance issue PrepareEnv(). function now automatically accepts conda Terms Service required channels, eliminating need manual acceptance. addresses issue reported #85. Multiple Python-based functions (RunPAGA, RunSCVELO, RunPalantir, RunCellRank, RunWOT, RunPHATE, RunPaCMAP, RunTriMap): Enhanced message formatting code improvements. PrepareSCExplorer(): Fixed package version dependency issues shiny bslib compatibility. function now properly handles bslib theme configuration work shiny 1.6.0 1.7.0+, addressing compatibility errors reported #87. Improved code formatting consistency across multiple functions. Enhanced Python functions inst/python/functions.py better error handling message formatting. Updated documentation multiple functions reflect code improvements.

title: scop 0.6.2
text: CellChatPlot(): Adjusted size saved figures better file size optimization. Updated README.md remove references Monocle2 Monocle3 (deprecated functions).

title: scop 0.6.1
text: PrepareEnv(): Improved message formatting simplified log output better user experience. Added get_conda_envs_dir() helper function centralize conda environment directory retrieval. integration_scop(): Enhanced integration_method parameter definition explicit method list better code clarity. Moved exist_python_pkgs() function check_package.R better code organization. Replaced direct conda_info()$envs_dirs[1] calls get_conda_envs_dir() helper function consistency. RunSCExplorer(): Updated use thisplot::palette_list thisplot::slim_data() instead scop::palette_list scop::slim_data(). Added thisplot dependency checks RunSCExplorer(). Updated documentation across multiple functions.

title: scop 0.6.0
text: PrepareEnv(): Enhanced environment caching mechanism avoid redundant environment preparation. Improved message formatting error handling. Python-based functions (RunPAGA(), RunSCVELO(), RunPalantir(), RunCellRank(), RunWOT()) now automatically call PrepareEnv() internally, eliminating need users manually prepare Python environment using functions. cluster_within_group2(): New function clustering within groups. Multiple plotting functions: Replaced geom_sankey() ggsankey::geom_sankey() better Sankey diagram support. Multiple functions: Replaced ::: operator get_namespace_fun() safer namespace access. Removed RunMonocle() function related documentation (RunMonocle2.Rd, RunMonocle3.Rd). Removed projection_functions.R file (functions moved locations). Replaced custom theme functions thisplot::theme_this() (exported theme_scop()). Replaced direct log_message() calls thisutils::log_message() consistency. Removed palette_list data object. Moved cli Suggests Imports better message formatting support. Added thisplot Imports theme utility functions. Added ggsankey Suggests Sankey diagram support. Added remote dependencies: theislab/destiny, mengxu98/thisplot. Removed unused dependencies: Biobase, BiocGenerics, concaveman, DDRTree, glmGamPoi, hexbin, monocle, png, ragg, tidyr. Updated documentation across multiple functions reflect code refactoring. Improved code organization maintainability.

title: scop 0.5.5
text: Fixed VelocityPlot() function error plot_type = "grid" mode: replaced vectorized arrow length fixed-length arrows (using mean length) resolve vapply() error occurred grid::arrow() received vector instead single value, see #72, #74.

title: scop 0.5.4
text: Fixed parameter name error CheckDataType() function calls: changed data parameter object RunKNNMap(), RunSymphonyMap(), RunScmap(), RunPCAMap(), RunSingleR() functions, see #68. Fixed SingleCellExperiment object creation RunScmap() RunSingleR() functions: changed coercing SummarizedExperiment directly constructing SingleCellExperiment objects.

title: scop 0.5.3
text: PrepareDB(): Changed default Ensembl_version parameter 103 NULL flexible version handling. Added Python version log_message() Python-based functions (RunSCVELO(), RunPAGA(), RunPalantir(), RunCellRank(), RunWOT()) added verbose parameter inheritance improved message formatting using cli-style formatting. Delete harmonizomeapi.py file. Move scop_analysis.py single functions.py file inst/python/ better code organization maintainability. Improved parameter documentation consistency.

title: scop 0.5.1
text: Improved reference formatting consistency across multiple functions. Enhanced documentation clarity readability.

title: scop 0.5.0
text: RunCellChat(): New function perform CellChat analysis investigating cell--cell communication support human, mouse, zebrafish species. CellChatPlot(): New function visualize CellChat analysis results various plot types customization options. Multiple integration functions: Improved error messages message formatting better user experience. Added CellChat package dependency remote repository jinworks/CellChat. Updated README.md improved code formatting examples. Enhanced documentation cell communication analysis functions. Improved error messages user guidance across integration functions. Removed example figures optimize package installation size.

title: scop 0.4.0
text: RunProportionTest(): New function perform Monte-carlo permutation test quantifying cell proportion differences conditions. ProportionTestPlot(): New function generate proportion test plots customizable significance thresholds visualization options. Multiple Python-based functions: add \dontrun{} blocks Github workfolw checking. Added comprehensive documentation new proportion testing functions. Enhanced example documentation across multiple functions. Updated package documentation examples.

title: scop 0.3.4
text: Updated workflow examples function documentation.

title: scop 0.3.3
text: Multiple functions: Improved parameter documentation formatting consistency across package.

title: scop 0.3.2
text: GetFeaturesData() AddFeaturesData(): Enhanced argument clarity, added input validation, standardized return values Seurat, Assay, Assay5 objects. Renamed parameters: query_cell_annotation → query_annotation, ref_cell_annotation → ref_annotation. Improved error message formatting using cli-style formatting. Simplified variable assignments improved readability. Comprehensive documentation updates across multiple functions including AnnotateFeatures, CellDimPlot, CellStatPlot, FeatureStatPlot, GroupHeatmap, RunCellQC, others. Improved parameter descriptions function clarity.

title: scop 0.3.1
text: EnrichmentPlot() GSEAPlot(): Removed conditional font face styling (face = ifelse() logic) better text rendering consistency. Set default value lineheight 0.5 0.7. Updated check_r() function improved package checking functionality. Updated reexports functionality. Updated documentation formatting consistency.

title: scop 0.3.0
text: Fixed segmentation faults R crashes M-series MacBook running Python functions. RunPAGA(): Enhanced M-series MacBook detection automatic environment configuration. RunSCVELO(): Added ARM64-specific optimizations prevent crashes ensure stable execution. RunCellRank(): Implemented M-series compatibility proper NUMBA configuration. RunPalantir(): Added ARM64 support single-threaded execution mode. RunWOT(): Enhanced M-series MacBook environment variable settings. RunTriMap(): Added M-series MacBook compatibility dimensionality reduction. RunPaCMAP(): Implemented ARM64-specific environment configuration. RunPHATE(): Added M-series MacBook support non-linear dimensionality reduction. RunCellQC(): Enhanced scrublet doubletdetection functions ARM64 compatibility. Updated function documentation reflect M-series MacBook compatibility. Added technical notes ARM64 architecture considerations.

title: scop 0.2.9
text: Fix bug RunSCVELO(). Updated documentation functions.

title: scop 0.2.7
text: Added internal function .check_pkg_status() check R package installed. Update function CheckDataType() S4 class function. Update function standard_scop(), make efficient. Delete lifemap data, including: lifemap_cell, lifemap_compartment lifemap_organ. Reconstructed sample data panc8_sub pancreas_sub, retaining basic Seurat object.

title: scop 0.2.6
text: Added remove_r() function easy remove R packages. Rename function: RemovePackages() remove_python(). Removed methods installing R packages check_r() function, retaining pak::pak. Delete useless import packages: BBmisc, BiocManager, covr, devtools, promises withr. Optimize structure _pkgdown.yml file. Updated documentation functions.

title: scop 0.2.5
text: Rename function: palette_scop() palette_colors().

title: scop 0.2.4
text: Rename functions: check_srt_merge() CheckDataMerge(), check_srt_list() CheckDataList check_data_type() CheckDataType.

title: scop 0.2.2
text: Replace BiocParallel::bplapply() thisutils::parallelize_fun(). Fix bugs RunSingleR().

title: scop 0.2.0
text: Added remove_python() function easy remove Python packages. Corrected issue py_to_r2() function (intrinsic function), ensures Python-dependent functions like RunPAGA() RunSCVELO() function run correctly.

title: scop 0.1.9
text: Update CellScoring() AddModuleScore2() functions. Now, new parameters cores verbose added. AddModuleScore2() function longer uses BiocParallel::bpparam() function enable parallelization, thisutils::parallelize_fun, cores parameter used control number cores thisutils::parallelize_fun.

title: scop 0.1.5
text: Fix error RunPalantir() function, see #23.

title: scop 0.1.4
text: Update .onAttach(), now .onAttach() print information conda Python. Update PrepareEnv() function easy add update conda environments install Python packages. Added ListEnv() RemoveEnv() functions easy management conda environment Python packages.

title: scop 0.1.3
text: Added TACSPlot() function creating FACS-like plots. Please refer Kernfeld et al. paper Github specific information.

title: scop 0.0.9
text: Fix bug PrepareEnv() function. default Python version now set 3.10-1.

title: scop 0.0.6
text: Add GetAssayData5() function, reimplementation GetAssayData(), compatibility Seurat v5 Assay objects. Updated GetFeaturesData() AddFeaturesData() function support retrieving adding feature metadata.

title: scop 0.0.5
text: Updated pancreas_sub panc8_sub test datasets Seurat v5 object format.

title: scop 0.0.1
text: Initial version
